items.summary_en: Maladaptive frugality argues that extreme thrift can undermine long-term value, quality, and innovation. The piece urges balancing cost control with intentional investment and risk tolerance in tech and product development.
items.summary_zh: 不良的节俭观提醒我们，过度节省可能削弱长期价值、质量与创新。文章倡导在成本控制与有意投资、承受风险之间取得平衡，特别是在技术与产品开发领域。

items.title_en: Show HN: Live Sun and Moon Dashboard with NASA Footage
items.title_zh: Show HN: 使用 NASA 影像的实时日月仪表板
items.summary_en: A Show HN project builds a live dashboard that renders Sun and Moon data using NASA footage. It demonstrates accessible, real-time space visualization and could be a handy template for hobbyists building data-driven dashboards.
items.summary_zh: 一个 Show HN 项目构建了一个实时日月仪表板，使用 NASA 影像呈现天体数据。它展示了面向爱好者的实时太空数据可视化潜力，并给初学者提供一个构建数据驱动仪表板的模板。

items.title_en: I built my own hair electrolysis machine
items.title_zh: 我自己动手做的脱毛用电解仪
items.summary_en: A detailed DIY account of building a home-use hair electrolysis device, including components, safety considerations, and practical challenges. It highlights the appeal and risks of DIY beauty hardware.
items.summary_zh: 详细记录自制家用脱毛电解仪的过程，涵盖所需组件、安全考量和实际挑战，揭示了DIY 美容硬件的吸引力与风险。

items.title_en: Show HN: Turning a Gaussian Splat into a videogame
items.title_zh: Show HN：将高斯斑点变成一款电子游戏
items.summary_en: A practical exploration turning 2D Gaussian splats—simple, soft-blurred particles—into a full game aesthetic. The approach highlights how lightweight rendering primitives can yield rich visuals and performance, useful for indie devs and rapid prototyping.
items.summary_zh: 通过将简单的高斯斑块用于游戏美术，展示了如何用轻量渲染基元实现丰富的视觉效果与高性能。此做法对独立游戏开发者和快速原型设计具有实用价值。

items.title_en: 10Gb/s Ethernet: what I did to get it working in my home
items.title_zh: 家庭网络的 10Gb/s 以太网：实现过程与经验
items.summary_en: Practical steps to get 10GbE working at home, from hardware choices (NICs, switches) to cabling and configuration. The piece demystifies the upgrade path, offering real-world performance expectations and guidance on when 10GbE makes sense for a home lab or small office. It also covers compatibility and heat/power considerations.
items.summary_zh: 作者分享在家庭环境中实现 10GbE 的实际步骤，从硬件选择、线缆、驱动到配置。文章解开升级谜团，给出真实世界的性能预期与何时值得投资的建议，同时讨论兼容性、热量与功耗等注意事项。

items.title_en: New copy of earliest poem in English, written 1,3k years ago, discovered in Rome
items.title_zh: 在罗马发现的最早英语诗新抄本（距今约1300年）
items.summary_en: A newly discovered copy of Caedmon’s Hymn—one of the oldest known English poems—has been found in Rome. The find expands the manuscript trail of early Old English verse and could yield new insights into linguistic features and performance contexts from the era. It also underscores how medieval texts circulated far beyond their likely origin.
items.summary_zh: 在罗马发现的《凯德蒙颂》最早英语诗歌新抄本被揭示。此发现扩展了早期古英语诗歌的手稿传承，为语言特征与表演传统提供新线索，并显示中世纪文本可能的跨地流传。

items.title_en: Open Design: Use Your Coding Agent as a Design Engine
items.title_zh: 开放式设计：把你的编码代理当成设计引擎
items.summary_en: Proposes using coding agents as design engines to automate design tasks, enabling code-driven workflows for UI prototyping. This approach demonstrates AI-assisted design at scale and the potential for tighter human-AI collaboration.
items.summary_zh: 提出把编码代理用作设计引擎，自动化设计任务并推动 UI 原型的代码驱动工作流。这种方式展现了大规模的 AI 辅助设计潜力，以及人机协作的新可能。

items.title_en: New mechanical panoramic film camera from Jeff Bridges
items.title_zh: Jeff Bridges 推出全新机械式全景胶片相机
items.summary_en: Jeff Bridges unveils a new mechanical panoramic film camera, a nod to analog photography in the digital era. The release taps into a niche but growing interest in hands-on, artifact-grade gear and could appeal to film enthusiasts seeking unique wide-format shots.
items.summary_zh: 演员 Jeff Bridges 推出全新机械式全景胶片相机，凸显在数字时代对纯胶片摄影的热情。此举迎合对手工操作、高品质器材的细分市场，或吸引追求独特大画幅效果的胶片爱好者。

items.title_en: Maryland to ban A.I.-driven price increases in grocery stores
items.title_zh: 马里兰成为首个禁止 AI 驱动涨价的超市定价的州
items.summary_en: Maryland passes a first-in-the-nation ban on AI-driven price increases in grocery stores, aiming to curb personalized pricing powered by consumer data. The move raises policy questions about fairness, transparency, and consumer protection in data-driven pricing.
items.summary_zh: 马里兰州成为首个禁止超市使用 AI 驱动定价策略的州，意在限制基于消费者数据的个性化定价。此举引发关于公平性、透明度与消费者保护之间的讨论。

items.title_en: The X-Files has made me nostalgic for a time I never experienced
items.title_zh: 《X档案》让我怀念一段我从未经历过的时光
items.summary_en: The piece reflects on how The X-Files stirs nostalgia for a tech-era people never experienced, shaping attitudes toward mystery, data, and surveillance today. It uses fan nostalgia to comment on media influence and the evolution of tech culture.
items.summary_zh: 作者通过《X档案》唤起对未曾经历过的上世纪科技与社会氛围的怀念，进而反思当代对数据、监控和隐私的认知。文章借助流行文化的怀旧感，探讨媒体如何塑造我们对技术时代的想象。

items.title_en: Why are there both TMP and TEMP environment variables? (2015)
items.title_zh: 为什么同时有 TMP 与 TEMP 环境变量？（2015）
items.summary_en: Explains that TMP and TEMP designate temp directories; the variables reflect historical design choices and precedence rules. The note helps clarify why some software behaves differently and how to set them to avoid confusion.
items.summary_zh: 解释 TMP 和 TEMP 都指向临时目录，这两个变量的存在源于历史设计与优先级规则。文中帮助读者理解为何有的软件表现不同，以及如何设置以避免混淆。

items.title_en: Biology is a Burrito: A text- and visual-based journey through a living cell
items.title_zh: 生物学就是一个卷饼：以文本与视觉讲述活细胞之旅
items.summary_en: Biology is a Burrito uses a playful, visual/textual journey to explain the cell, making biology approachable for newcomers. It blends diagrams and narrative to demystify the unit of life and how cells function.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章以幽默的比喻和生动的图文，带读者从文本与图像双线索理解细胞，降低了生物学的门槛。通过插画与叙事，阐释生命单位细胞的结构与功能。

items.title_en: Mike: open-source legal AI
items.title_zh: Mike：开源法律 AI
items.summary_en: Mike is an open-source legal AI project aiming to make legal research and drafting more transparent and customizable. It emphasizes auditable models and community governance, appealing to developers who want control over their legal AI stack.
items.summary_zh: Mike 是一个开源的法律 AI 项目，旨在让法律研究与起草工作更加透明、可定制。它强调可审计的模型与社区治理，吸引希望掌控自身法律 AI 堆栈的开发者。

items.title_en: OpenWarp
items.title_zh: OpenWarp
items.summary_en: OpenWarp appears to be an open-source project focused on warp-themed tooling.
items.summary_zh: OpenWarp 看起来是一个聚焦于 warp 相关工具的开源项目。

items.title_en: For thirty years I programmed with Phish on, every day
items.title_zh: 三十年里我每天都和 Phish 一起编程
items.summary_en: A personal meditation on how Phish’s music shaped the author’s coding flow for decades, merging rhythm with problem solving. It offers a human side of software craft and how music can underpin productive workflows.
items.summary_zh: 作者三十年来每天在编程时聆听 Phish，音乐与编码节奏彼此呼应，成为个人工作流的一部分。文章从人性的角度探讨了音乐对软件创作的影响。

items.title_en: I'm Peter Roberts, immigration attorney who does work for YC and startups. AMA
items.title_zh: 我是 Peter Roberts，一位为 YC 与初创公司提供移民法律服务的律师
items.summary_en: Peter Roberts, an immigration attorney who works with YC and startups, hosts an AMA about visas, sponsorship pipelines, and global hiring realities for startups.
items.summary_zh: Peter Roberts 这位为 YC 与初创公司提供移民法律服务的律师开启 AMA，解答签证选项、赞助流程及全球招聘中的现实挑战。

items.title_en: Three men are facing charges in Toronto SMS Blaster arrests
items.title_zh: 多伦多短信轰炸案：三人被控44项罪名
items.summary_en: Three men in Toronto have been charged on 44 counts tied to an SMS blaster operation, illustrating sustained crackdown on bulk texting abuse. The case spotlights enforcement tightening around illegal marketing practices and the tech, telecom, and compliance risks for companies relying on bulk messaging. It also shows prosecutors pursuing cross-border digital crimes as part of telecom fraud enforcement.
items.summary_zh: 多伦多三名男子就一桩大规模短信轰炸案被控44项罪名，显示对垃圾短信的打击在加码。此案凸显对非法营销行为的执法加强，以及涉及企业在短信传播中的合规与风险。检方也在跨境数字犯罪打击中持续行动。

items.title_en: Mo RAM, Mo Problems (2025)
items.title_zh: 內存之痛再升級（2025）
items.summary_en: Memory constraints continue to shape software design in 2025, pushing developers toward memory-aware data structures, smarter caching, and leaner runtimes.
items.summary_zh: 2025 年的軟件設計仍被內存限制左右，推動開發者採用更節省內存的資料結構、智慧快取與更輕量的執行環境。文章突顯內存使用與性能之間的實際取捨，對後端與嵌入式開發者具有參考價值。

items.title_en: Alignment whack-a-mole: Finetuning activates recall of copyrighted books in LLMs
items.title_zh: 对齐打地鼠：微调会让 LLM 记忆受版权保护书籍
items.summary_en: A 'alignment whack-a-mole' project shows finetuning can cause LLMs to recall copyrighted book passages, highlighting risks of data memorization in trained models. The work prompts discussion on safe alignment techniques and copyright compliance.
items.summary_zh: 一个名为对齐打地鼠的研究显示，微调可能让大语言模型记忆并召回受版权保护的书籍段落，凸显训练数据记忆带来的版权与安全风险。该工作引发关于如何在对齐中降低记忆、并确保版权合规的讨论。

items.title_en: Dillo Browser Release 3.3.0
items.title_zh: Dillo 浏览器 3.3.0 版本发布
items.summary_en: Dillo 3.3.0 arrives with updates focused on lean footprint and modern web compatibility, continuing the ultralight browser niche. It remains appealing for embedded devices and privacy-minded users despite limited features.
items.summary_zh: Dillo 3.3.0 发布，强调保持极小体积并提升对现代网页的兼容性，延续了这款极简浏览器的定位。对于嵌入式设备和注重隐私的用户仍具吸引力，尽管功能有限。

items.title_en: Bankruptcies increase 11.9 percent
items.title_zh: 破产案件数量增长 11.9%
items.summary_en: Bankruptcies rose 11.9% year over year, signaling ongoing financial stress for individuals and small businesses amid macro headwinds. The uptick has implications for credit markets, consumer spending, and the resilience of the broader economy.
items.summary_zh: 破产案件同比增长 11.9%，显示个人和小企业在宏观经济压力下持续承压。此趋势可能影响信贷市场、消费者支出与经济韧性。

items.title_en: The smelly baby problem
items.title_zh: 臭味婴儿问题
items.summary_en: Disposable diapers addressed odor by redesigning absorbency, materials, and containment, fueling wide adoption over cloth alternatives. The story also weighs environmental costs and the rapid growth of the diaper market.
items.summary_zh: 一次性尿布通过改进吸收性、材料和封控设计解决了“臭味”问题，从而推动了相对于布尿布的广泛采用。文章也讨论了环境成本与尿布产业的快速扩张。

items.title_en: Full-Text Search with DuckDB
items.title_zh: DuckDB 的全文检索
items.summary_en: A practical guide to enabling full-text search with DuckDB, outlining the setup, indexing strategies, and performance considerations. The piece demonstrates how embedded analytics databases can provide rich search capabilities without requiring separate search engines, useful for data apps and notebooks. It also notes caveats compared to dedicated search systems.
items.summary_zh: 介绍在 DuckDB 中实现全文检索的实用指南，涵盖设置、索引策略及性能考量。展示了嵌入式分析数据库在无需独立搜索引擎的情况下提供丰富检索能力，对数据应用和笔记本场景尤为有用，同时也提醒了相对于专门的搜索系统的局限。

items.title_en: Flock cameras keep telling police a man who doesn't have a warrant has a warrant
items.title_zh: Flock 摄像头反复告知警方，一名无逮捕令的男子被错误标记为有逮捕令
items.summary_en: A video shows Flock cameras repeatedly flag a man as having a warrant, despite no warrant in reality. This highlights the risks of automated surveillance tools misidentifying individuals, potentially leading to wrongful police action and civil-liberties concerns.
items.summary_zh: 视频显示 Flock 的摄像系统反复将一名无逮捕令的男子错误标记为有逮捕令。这凸显了自动化监控工具在识别个人时可能产生的误判，带来潜在的权利侵害与滥用风险。

items.title_en: Functional programmers need to take a look at Zig
items.title_zh: 函数式程序员该看看 Zig
items.summary_en: The piece argues that Zig's design—simplicity, cross-language ergonomics, and low-level control—should attract functional programmers. It suggests exploring Zig as a practical tool for FP workflows and systems programming.
items.summary_zh: 该文认为 Zig 的简洁设计、跨语言的易用性与底层控制能力，值得函数式编程者关注。它建议将 Zig 作为提升函数式编程工作流与系统编程的实用工具进行尝试。

items.title_en: Lib0xc: A set of C standard library-adjacent APIs for safer systems programming
items.title_zh: Lib0xc：一组更安全的 C 标准库相关 API，面向更安全的系统编程
items.summary_en: Lib0xc provides a set of C standard library-adjacent APIs that emphasize safety for systems programming, with bounds-checked routines and safer defaults to reduce memory-safety risks while staying compatible with existing C code.
items.summary_zh: Lib0xc 提供一组接近 C 标准库的更安全 API，聚焦在边界检查和更安全的默认行为，帮助降低系统编程中的内存安全风险，同时尽量保持与现有代码的兼容性。

items.title_en: Vercel’s pricing page
items.title_zh: Vercel 的定价页
items.summary_en: Vercel's pricing page is under scrutiny for how it's structured—potential changes around free tier, team plans, and build-time costs. The analysis compares value and predictability for startups choosing a hosting/edge platform.
items.summary_zh: 对 Vercel 定价结构的评估揭示了免费层、团队计划与构建成本等方面的潜在变化与误解。该分析帮助初创公司在选择托管/边缘计算平台时评估价值与可预测性。

items.title_en: Intel Arc Pro B70 Review
items.title_zh: 英特尔 Arc Pro B70 评测
items.summary_en: The Arc Pro B70 review finds competitive performance for professional workloads, with strengths in 3D rendering and AI tasks, while noting drivers and software ecosystem as ongoing caveats. It positions Intel as a viable option in workstation GPUs against established rivals.
items.summary_zh: Arc Pro B70 在专业工作负载方面表现具竞争力，尤其是在 3D 渲染与 AI 任务上，但驱动与软件生态仍需改善。此次评测让英特尔在工作站级显卡领域成为对抗对手的可行选择。

items.title_en: It's OK to abandon your side-project (2024)
items.title_zh: 放弃副项目也没关系
items.summary_en: Dropping a side project can be a healthy, pragmatic choice when it no longer serves your goals. It frees time for higher-priority work and prevents sunk-cost traps, while still offering lessons learned from the attempt.
items.summary_zh: 放弃一个副项目往往是成熟的选择，能让你把精力集中在更重要的目标上，避免继续陷入已投入的成本陷阱。即使放弃，也能从尝试中汲取有价值的经验。

items.title_en: Show HN: Drive any macOS app in the background without stealing the cursor
items.title_zh: Show HN：在后台驱动任意 macOS 应用且不抢光标
items.summary_en: A Show HN introduces Cua, a macOS tool that lets you drive any app in the background without taking over the cursor. It enables smoother multi-app workflows and automation scenarios where focus management is a constraint.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 介绍的 Cua 是一个 macOS 工具，允许在后台控制任意应用且不抢占光标，提升多任务与自动化场景的工作流畅度。

items.title_en: Canonical/Ubuntu have been under DDoS
items.title_zh: Canonical/Ubuntu 遭遇超过15小时的 DDoS 攻击
items.summary_en: Canonical and Ubuntu infrastructure faced a sustained DDoS attack lasting more than 15 hours, disrupting services and user access. The incident underscores the need for robust DDoS defenses and incident response in high-visibility open-source ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: Canonical 与 Ubuntu 的基础设施遭受持续超过15小时的 DDoS 攻击，影响服务与用户访问。事件凸显在高可见性开源生态中部署强大防护和应急响应能力的重要性。

items.title_en: Does Postgres Scale?
items.title_zh: Postgres 能否扩展？
items.summary_en: A benchmarking post measures workflow execution scalability on PostgreSQL, exploring how well it handles growing complexity and parallelism. The results suggest PostgreSQL can scale for certain workloads with careful design, but may hit limits without specialized architecture.
items.summary_zh: 一篇基准测试文章评估 PostgreSQL 在工作流执行方面的扩展性，探讨其在日益复杂和并行化的任务中的表现。结论显示，在合适的设计下 PostgreSQL 可以在部分工作负载上实现可观的扩展性，但遇到极端规模时可能需要更专门的架构或工具。

items.title_en: AISLE Discovers 38 CVEs in OpenEMR Healthcare Software
items.title_zh: AISLE 在 OpenEMR 医疗软件中发现 38 个 CVE 漏洞
items.summary_en: Security researchers AISLE disclosed 38 CVEs in OpenEMR, including critical flaws that could enable exploitation. The widely used healthcare software powering thousands of providers underscores the importance of timely patching and secure software supply chains.
items.summary_zh: 安全研究公司 AISLE 在 OpenEMR 医疗软件中发现 38 个 CVE 漏洞，其中多处具有关键严重性，可能导致被利用。OpenEMR 被大量医疗机构使用，此事凸显了及时修补和保障医疗软件供应链安全的必要性。

items.title_en: Show HN: Rip.so – a graveyard for dead internet things
items.title_zh: Rip.so：死网遗产的墓园
items.summary_en: Rip.so serves as a cemetery for defunct internet services and artifacts, curating links, projects, and data that vanished over time. It highlights how quickly digital ecosystems decay and the value of archiving internet history for researchers and enthusiasts.
items.summary_zh: Rip.so 提供一个专门存放已消失的互联网服务与遗存的“墓园”，帮助研究者与怀旧者访问‘消逝的网络’遗迹。此举凸显了对技术史的记录和透明度的重要性。

items.title_en: Show HN: Free textbook on engineering thermodynamics
items.title_zh: 工程热力学免费教材
items.summary_en: A comprehensive, open-access textbook on engineering thermodynamics is freely available online, spanning fundamentals, cycles, and practical applications. It can save students money and serve as a reliable reference for courses, labs, and self-study.
items.summary_zh: 一部工程热力学的免费电子教材现已在线开放获取，涵盖基础、循环与实际应用等内容。为学生、教师和自学者提供了省钱且可靠的参考资料。

items.title_en: How far behind is each major Chromium browser?
items.title_zh: 各大 Chromium 浏览器的落后程度到底有多远？
items.summary_en: A comparative look at how far behind each major Chromium-based browser is from upstream Chromium in features, performance, and update cadence.
items.summary_zh: 对比各大 Chromium 基础浏览器在功能、性能和更新节奏方面与上游 Chromium 的差距。揭示对网页兼容性和用户感知现代性可能造成的影响。

items.title_en: Barman – Backup and Recovery Manager for PostgreSQL
items.title_zh: Barman：PostgreSQL 备份与恢复管理工具
items.summary_en: Barman centralizes PostgreSQL backups and recovery, enabling remote streaming backups, PITR, and automated maintenance across multiple servers. It's a mature option for DB admins seeking auditable, disaster-ready protection in PostgreSQL deployments.
items.summary_zh: Barman 集中管理 PostgreSQL 的备份与恢复，支持远程流式备份、时间点恢复以及跨服务器的自动化运维，帮助运维团队实现可审计、灾难就绪的数据库保护。

items.title_en: A network smuggling Starlink tech into Iran to beat internet blackout
items.title_zh: 秘密网络通过走私 Starlink 设备进入伊朗以绕过互联网封锁
items.summary_en: A clandestine network smuggled Starlink hardware into Iran to bypass a government internet blackout. The move highlights how satellite-based connectivity can undermine censorship, raising questions about regulatory controls and information access. It also shows the ongoing tension between tech access and state control.
items.summary_zh: 一个秘密网络向伊朗走私 Starlink 设备，试图突破政府的互联网封锁。此举揭示卫星联网在规避审查方面的潜力，同时引发对监管、供应链及信息获取影响的讨论。

items.title_en: Dotcl: Common Lisp Implementation on .NET
items.title_zh: Dotcl：在 .NET 上实现的 Common Lisp
items.summary_en: Dotcl brings Common Lisp to the .NET platform, enabling Lisp code to run on the CLR and interoperate with other .NET languages. This opens up Lisp’s dynamic features to .NET developers and enhances language interoperability.
items.summary_zh: Dotcl 将 Common Lisp 引入 .NET 平台，使 Lisp 代码能在 CLR 上运行并与其他 .NET 语言互操作。这为 .NET 开发者带来 Lisp 的动态特性，并提升语言互操作性。

items.title_en: The 1944 Warsaw Uprising, in Color
items.title_zh: 1944 年华沙起义，彩色再现
items.summary_en: The project colorizes archival footage of the 1944 Warsaw Uprising, bringing new visual context to a pivotal WWII event. It highlights how modern AI and video projects intersect with history and media preservation.
items.summary_zh: 通过对 1944 年华沙起义档案影像进行彩色化，该项目为这一历史事件带来新的视觉语境，提升了历史与媒体保存的现代技术应用。展示了 AI 在历史记录中的作用与局限。

items.title_en: "People who don't use AI will be left behind"
items.title_zh: 不使用 AI 的人将被落在后面
items.summary_en: An opinion piece argues AI adoption is essential to stay competitive, warning that teams neglecting AI risk falling behind. It discusses practical steps to start using AI responsibly and effectively.
items.summary_zh: 一篇观点文章认为要保持竞争力，必须采用 AI；若团队忽视 AI，可能落后。文章还讨论了负责任、有效地开始使用 AI 的实际步骤。

items.title_en: Open source does not imply open community
items.title_zh: 开源并不等同于开放社区
items.summary_en: The post argues that open-source projects can still have closed or gated communities, highlighting governance, contributor inclusion, and decision-making opacity. The takeaway: open source ≠ open governance; communities matter for sustainability.
items.summary_zh: 文章指出开源项目也可能存在封闭的或受限的社区治理现象，强调治理透明度、参与者包容性与决策过程的重要性。结论是开源并不等同于开放的治理体系，社区的结构影响长期可持续性。

items.title_en: U.S. Debt Tops 100% of GDP
items.title_zh: 美国债务总额超过 GDP 100%
items.summary_en: The U.S. debt-to-GDP ratio has surpassed 100%, underscoring fiscal policy constraints and potential macroeconomic risks for higher interest payments and investment in tech.
items.summary_zh: 美国债务与 GDP 比率超过 100%，凸显财政政策的约束和对更高利息支出及科技投资的潜在宏观风险。

items.title_en: Meetings are forcing functions
items.title_zh: 會議是推動決策的強力觸發器
items.summary_en: Meetings are framed as forcing functions that drive decisions and alignment. The piece offers strategies for efficient meeting design, clearer ownership, and reduced time waste.
items.summary_zh: 會議被視為推動決策與達成共識的強力觸發器。文章提出高效會議設計、明確責任分配與減少時間浪費的策略。

items.title_en: Show HN: Apple's SHARP running in the browser via ONNX runtime web
items.title_zh: Show HN：Apple 的 Sharp 在浏览器中通过 ONNX Runtime Web 运行
items.summary_en: A Show HN post demonstrates Apple’s Sharp running in the browser via ONNX Runtime Web. It showcases how browser-based inference can be feasible for certain ML workloads without server round-trips.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示 Apple 的 Sharp 如何通过 ONNX Runtime Web 在浏览器中运行。演示了在浏览器端进行机器学习推理在无需服务器往返的情况下的可行性。讨论了在 JavaScript 环境中运行非原生模型时的可访问性与性能取舍。

items.title_en: Box to save memory in Rust
items.title_zh: Rust 中的 Box：节省内存的思路
items.summary_en: Examines how Box<T> can reduce memory usage in Rust in certain patterns, weighing heap allocation costs against layout improvements and potential performance gains. The guidance helps readers decide when boxing is beneficial or避免不必要的装箱.
items.summary_zh: 探讨在特定模式下，Box<T> 如何降低 Rust 的内存占用，权衡堆分配成本与布局优化及潜在性能收益，帮助读者判断何时值得使用 Box，何时应避免不必要的装箱。

items.title_en: Pgrx: Build Postgres Extensions with Rust
items.title_zh: Pgrx：用 Rust 构建 Postgres 扩展
items.summary_en: Pgrx provides a Rust-based framework for developing PostgreSQL extensions, leveraging Rust’s safety and performance. It streamlines building, testing, and distributing extensions, potentially widening Rust’s role in database tooling. This lowers the barrier for writing robust, high-performance server extensions.
items.summary_zh: Pgrx 提供基于 Rust 的框架来开发 PostgreSQL 扩展，利用 Rust 的安全性与性能。它简化了扩展的构建、测试与部署，有望扩大 Rust 在数据库工具链中的应用。为编写高性能、健壮的数据库扩展降低了门槛。

items.title_en: Windows quality update: Progress we've made since March
items.title_zh: Windows 质量更新：自三月以来取得的进展
items.summary_en: Microsoft outlines measurable progress in Windows quality updates since March, including reliability fixes and performance improvements. The update cadence shows ongoing patches and testing aimed at stabilizing enterprise and consumer deployments. For IT teams, this signals a maturing quality regime with quicker feedback loops from real-world usage.
items.summary_zh: 微软自三月以来在 Windows 质量更新方面取得了可衡量的进展，包括可靠性修复和性能提升。更新节奏强调持续打补丁与测试，致力于稳定企业与消费者部署。对 IT 团队而言，这预示着质量体系日渐成熟，能更快结合实际使用反馈。

items.title_en: The agent harness belongs outside the sandbox
items.title_zh: 代理 Harness 应该放在沙箱外运行
items.summary_en: The article argues that the agent harness belongs outside the sandbox to reduce the risk of sandbox escapes. It discusses architectural trade-offs and how separating trust boundaries can improve security and reliability for AI agents.
items.summary_zh: 文章主张为降低沙箱逃逸风险，应将代理 Harness 放在沙箱外运行，并分析将信任边界分离带来的安全与可靠性提升。

items.title_en: Understand Anything
items.title_zh: Understand Anything 项目
items.summary_en: Understand Anything is a project aiming to build a broad reasoning interface to demystify complex concepts and code across domains. It explores universal explainability tooling and cross-domain collaboration.
items.summary_zh: Understand Anything 项目旨在构建一个广域推理界面，以跨领域解释复杂概念与代码。它探索普适的可解释性工具以及跨领域协作的可能。

items.title_en: Eka’s robotic claw feels like we're approaching a ChatGPT moment
items.title_zh: Eka 的机械爪让人感觉我们正迎来‘ChatGPT 时刻’
items.summary_en: A robotic claw from Eka demonstrates AI-assisted manipulation, hinting at a future where robots interpret language models to guide physical tasks.
items.summary_zh: Eka 的机器人爪展示了 AI 辅助的抓取与操作，暗示未来机器人可能借助语言模型来理解指令并完成复杂物理任务。

items.title_en: Magic: The Gathering took me from N2 to Japanese fluency
items.title_zh: 魔法风云会让我从日语能力测试 N2 提升到日语流利
items.summary_en: A personal narrative shows how Magic: The Gathering communities can accelerate language learning, turning hobby-driven immersion into practical gains. The piece reflects how niche communities foster real-world skill development.
items.summary_zh: 一个以 Magic: The Gathering 为线索的语言学习故事，展示爱好驱动的沉浸式体验如何转化为实际的语言能力提升。此文也反映了小众社群在现实世界技能发展中的作用。

items.title_en: AWS stops billing Middle East cloud customers as repairs to war damage drag on
items.title_zh: AWS 暂停对中东云服务客户计费，修复战争造成的损坏仍在进行中
items.summary_en: Amazon Web Services paused billing for Middle East cloud customers due to ongoing repairs from war damage to data centers, extending the disruption for clients relying on regional services. The incident highlights how geopolitical conflict can ripple into cloud economics and service continuity, prompting questions about resilience and billing transparency.
items.summary_zh: 亚马逊云服务因战争造成的数据中心损坏仍在修复中，暂停对中东地区云服务客户的计费。此举暴露出地缘政治冲击对云服务、运营成本和计费透明度的影响，凸显对韧性和客户沟通的需求。

items.title_en: When the cheap one is the cool one
items.title_zh: 便宜才酷：便宜也能精彩
items.summary_en: Argues that affordable hardware or services often deliver better value and design elegance than premium options, challenging consumer tech narratives. The piece looks at where price-performance tradeoffs outperform prestige brands and what this means for builders.
items.summary_zh: 主张经济实惠的硬件或服务往往提供更高性价比和更巧妙的设计，挑战了对豪华品牌的偏见。文章分析何时价格/性能的权衡超过品牌溢价，以及这对开发者意味着什么。

items.title_en: The text mode lie: why modern TUIs are a nightmare for accessibility
items.title_zh: 文本模式的谎言：为何现代 TUI 对无障碍是一场噩梦
items.summary_en: Argues that modern text-based user interfaces often fail accessibility due to ambiguous layouts, keyboard traps, and screen-reader inconsistencies, calling for accessibility-first design principles.
items.summary_zh: 指出现代文本用户界面在无障碍方面的不足，原因包括布局模糊、键盘陷阱和屏幕阅读器不一致，呼吁以无障碍优先的设计原则。

items.title_en: Chernobyl wildlife forty years on
items.title_zh: 切尔诺贝利四十年：野生动物的现状
items.summary_en: Forty years after the disaster, wildlife in and around Chernobyl demonstrates resilience and ecological shifts, offering nuanced insights into radiation's long-term ecological effects.
items.summary_zh: 切尔诺贝利灾难四十年后，区域内外的野生动物展现出韧性与生态变迁，为放射性长期影响提供了更细致的解读。

items.title_en: CPanel and WHM Authentication Bypass – CVE-2026-41940
items.title_zh: CPanel 与 WHM 身份验证绕过漏洞 CVE-2026-41940
items.summary_en: A CVE-2026-41940 describes an authentication bypass in CPanel/WHM, potentially allowing attackers to access privileged accounts. The advisory urges upgrading to patched versions and applying mitigations; administrators should rotate credentials and review access controls.
items.summary_zh: CPanel/WHM 的身份验证绕过漏洞 CVE-2026-41940 已披露，可能使攻击者获取特权账户权限。建议尽快升级到修补版本并应用缓解措施，同时检查访问控制和凭据轮换。

items.title_en: Behavioral timescale synaptic plasticity rewires the brain after an experience
items.title_zh: 行为时间尺度的突触可塑性
items.summary_en: A new form of neuroplasticity rewires brain circuits after a single experience, revealing rapid mechanisms that underlie learning and memory. The finding has implications for AI-inspired neuroscience and understanding how experiences shape networks fast.
items.summary_zh: 一种新的突触可塑性形式在单次经历后就重塑大脑回路，揭示快速学习记忆的机制。该发现对受 AI 启发的神经科学研究及理解经验如何迅速塑造网络具有重要意义。

items.title_en: WASM is not quite a stack machine
items.title_zh: WASM 并非完全的栈机
items.summary_en: WebAssembly isn’t a pure stack machine; it uses an operand stack for expressions but relies on explicit locals, typed values, and structured control flow. This hybrid model informs how compilers, tooling, and runtimes optimize and debug Wasm modules. Understanding the nuance helps engineers design better performance and tooling strategies.
items.summary_zh: WebAssembly 并非完全的栈机；它在表达式上使用操作数栈，但依赖显式局部变量、类型化值和结构化控制流。这一混合模型影响编译器、工具链与运行时在优化与调试 Wasm 模块时的策略。理解这一差异有助于在性能和工具开发上做出更明智的选择。

items.title_en: Whohas – Command-line utility for cross-distro, cross-repository package search
items.title_zh: whohas：跨发行版、跨仓库的软件包搜索命令行工具
items.summary_en: whohas is a CLI tool to search packages across Linux distributions and repositories, streamlining compatibility checks for multi-distro environments. It helps developers quickly locate where a package exists and what version is available, reducing dependency guesswork.
items.summary_zh: whohas 是一个命令行工具，用于跨 Linux 发行版和仓库搜索软件包，简化多发行环境下的兼容性检查。它帮助开发者快速定位软件包的位置与可用版本，降低依赖猜测成本。

items.title_en: I accidentally made law enforcement shut down their fake honeypot
items.title_zh: 我不小心让执法部门关闭了他们的假蜜罐
items.summary_en: A blogger recounts accidentally causing law-enforcement's fake honeypot to be shut down, sharing insights into the risks and legal-gray areas of threat-hunting tooling. The post offers practical lessons on responsible disclosure and civility in cybersecurity experiments.
items.summary_zh: 博主讲述自己意外导致执法部门的假蜜罐被关闭的经历，探讨威胁猎杀工具的风险与法律边界。文中提出在网络安全实验中实现负责任披露与克制的实用经验。

items.title_en: Can You Find the Comet?
items.title_zh: 你能找到彗星吗？
items.summary_en: The feature highlights a comet visible in the sky and offers practical tips for observers on when and how to spot it. It underscores how approachable astronomy can be with public imagery and gentle guidance. For hobbyists, it’s a reminder that celestial fireworks are within reach with a clear sky and a little patience.
items.summary_zh: 该日的天文图片鼓励观星爱好者在夜空中寻找彗星，并给出观测条件和时间的建议。通过易懂的指导，读者能更易上手天文观测。对于爱好者，这提醒我们在晴朗夜空与一点耐心下就能看到天文奇观。

items.title_en: Interview with Bob Odenkirk
items.title_zh: 鲍勃·奥登科克访谈
items.summary_en: Bob Odenkirk discusses his career trajectory, writing philosophy, and how humor blends with drama in his work. He shares behind-the-scenes insights on shaping character and collaboration.
items.summary_zh: 鲍勃·奥登科克在访谈中谈及职业发展、写作理念，以及幽默与戏剧性在工作中的融合，分享了塑造角色与合作的幕后见解。

items.title_en: American Dads Became the Parents Their Fathers Never Were
items.title_zh: 美国爸爸已成为比父亲辈更愿意花时间陪伴子女的父母
items.summary_en: Derek Thompson argues that richer dads are spending more time with their children than their own fathers did, reflecting debt of time and resources across generations. The piece analyzes how wealth, work flexibility, and social norms shape parenting, with implications for child development and family policy.
items.summary_zh: Derek Thompson 指出，富裕阶层的父亲花在陪伴子女上的时间增多，超过了他们父辈的水平。文章分析财富、工作灵活性和社会规范如何塑造育儿方式，并对儿童发展与家庭政策产生影响。

items.title_en: HardenedBSD Is Now Officially on Radicle
items.title_zh: HardenedBSD 正式接入 Radicle
items.summary_en: HardenedBSD has officially joined Radicle, bringing its security-hardened codebase to the decentralized, peer-to-peer collaboration network. The integration enables HardenedBSD developers to collaborate without relying on centralized services, leveraging Radicle’s distributed version control and verification workflow. This move highlights growing interest in decentralized development tooling for security-focused projects.
items.summary_zh: HardenedBSD 已正式加入 Radicle，将其安全强化代码库带入去中心化的点对点协作网络。此次集成允许开发者在不依赖中心化服务的情况下协作，利用 Radicle 的分布式版本控制与验证工作流。这一举动凸显了安全导向项目对去中心化开发工具的关注日增。

items.title_en: Supreme Court to hear arguments in landmark Roundup weedkiller case
items.title_zh: 最高法院就 Roundup 除草剂案举行辩论
items.summary_en: The Supreme Court will hear arguments in a landmark glyphosate Roundup case, with potential implications for product liability and pesticide regulation.
items.summary_zh: 最高法院将就里程碑式的 Roundup 除草剂案开庭辩论，可能影响产品责任诉讼和农药监管的走向。

items.title_en: Running Adobe's 1991 PostScript Interpreter in the Browser
items.title_zh: 在浏览器中运行 Adobe 的 1991 年 PostScript 解释器
items.summary_en: A project ports Adobe's 1991 PostScript interpreter to run in the browser, allowing faithful rendering of legacy PostScript documents without server-side tooling. It highlights the challenges of porting a vintage interpreter to modern environments and the performance/precision considerations involved. The effort underscores the value of emulation for digital preservation and retro computing.
items.summary_zh: 一个将 Adobe 1991 年 PostScript 解释器移植到浏览器的项目，使老旧的 PostScript 文档能够在客户端渲染，避免对服务器端运行时的依赖。展示了把历史解释器带入现代运行时的挑战以及性能与精度的权衡。此工作凸显了在数字保存和复古计算领域，浏览器端仿真的重要性。

items.title_en: The Visible Zorker: Zork 1
items.title_zh: 可视化 Zorker：Zork I
items.summary_en: The Visible Zorker showcases Zork I in a visible/interactive format that reveals the game's state and parser workings as you play. It serves as a folk-history glimpse into interactive fiction and makes classic text adventures approachable for newcomers.
items.summary_zh: ‘可视化 Zorker’ 将 Zork I 以可视化/交互的形式呈现，揭示玩家操作时解析器和游戏状态的运作。它为交互式小说的历史提供直观展示，也让新玩家更易接触这类文本冒险游戏。

items.title_en: The USB Situation
items.title_zh: USB 的现状与困境
items.summary_en: A critical look at USB's ecosystem, highlighting design complexity, security issues, and compatibility friction. The piece argues for clearer standards and smarter engineering to reduce pain points for developers and users.
items.summary_zh: 深入剖析 USB 生态的设计复杂性、安全问题与兼容性挑战，主张通过更清晰的标准与更智能的工程实践来缓解开发者与用户的痛点。

items.title_en: GitHub – DOS 1.0: Transcription of Tim Paterson's DOS Printouts
items.title_zh: GitHub：DOS 1.0—Tim Paterson 的 DOS 打印稿逐字转录
items.summary_en: A historical data project transcribes Tim Paterson's DOS 1.0 printouts, revealing design decisions and implementation details from the original era. The work provides a rare window into early PC DOS development for historians and retro-computing enthusiasts.
items.summary_zh: 这一历史档案项目对 Tim Paterson 的 DOS 1.0 打印稿进行逐字转录，揭示早期 DOS 设计与实现的细节。此工作为研究者与复古计算爱好者提供珍贵的历史视窗。

items.title_en: U.S. companies back Sam Altman's World ID even as much of the world pushes back
items.title_zh: 美企支持 Sam Altman 的 World ID，即便全球多地对其持反对态度
items.summary_en: US companies back World ID amid global pushback against WorldCoin's privacy concerns. The collaboration highlights a cautious adoption path for universal digital identity, with implications for onboarding, consent, and data governance across platforms.
items.summary_zh: 美国公司支持 World ID，而全球范围对 WorldCoin 的隐私担忧与反对仍在增加。此举显示了对全球性数字身份的谨慎采用路径，并可能影响各平台的注册、同意与数据治理。

items.title_en: Canada's first sovereign wealth fund
items.title_zh: 加拿大设立首个主权财富基金
items.summary_en: Canada launches its first sovereign wealth fund to manage natural resource revenues and diversify government investment. Backed by policy leadership from figures like Carney, the fund aims to stabilize revenues and invest in long-term national projects.
items.summary_zh: 加拿大设立首个主权财富基金，旨在管理自然资源收入并多元化政府投资。由卡尼等领衔的政策领导力推动，基金目标在于稳定财政收入并为长期国家项目择优投资。

items.title_en: Embedded Rust or C firmware? Lessons from an industrial microcontroller use case
items.title_zh: 工业微控制器用例中的嵌入式 Rust 与 C 固件取舍
items.summary_en: A case study contrasts using Rust versus C for embedded firmware on an industrial MCU. It weighs safety, determinism, and resource constraints against tooling and ecosystem maturity, offering practical lessons on when Rust's memory safety is worth the trade-offs. It also covers integration with existing toolchains and debugging considerations in real-time environments.
items.summary_zh: 一项用例研究对工业微控制器上的嵌入式固件，比较 Rust 与 C 的实现。在权衡安全性、确定性和资源约束的同时，讨论工具链成熟度对选择的影响，并给出在实时环境中何时采用 Rust 的实际建议。还涉及与现有工具链的集成及调试注意事项。

items.title_en: A Primer on Bézier Curves – So What Makes a Bézier Curve?
items.title_zh: 贝塞尔曲线入门：到底是什么构成贝塞尔曲线？
items.summary_en: Breaks down Bezier curves, explaining control points, the De Casteljau construction, and how these curves underpin vector graphics and font design. The guide also contrasts Bezier with other spline types and gives practical tips for use.
items.summary_zh: 贝塞尔曲线入门讲解了控制点、De Casteljau 算法及其在矢量图形、字体设计中的应用，並比较了与其他样条的区别，给出实际使用要点。

items.title_en: FreeBSD Device Drivers Book
items.title_zh: FreeBSD 设备驱动书籍
items.summary_en: The FreeBSD Device Drivers Book on GitHub offers structured guidance for writing kernel drivers, with practical examples and explanations of FreeBSD's driver interfaces. It’s a resource for developers looking to contribute to or build drivers on FreeBSD.
items.summary_zh: FreeBSD 设备驱动书籍在 GitHub 上提供系统化的驱动开发指南，结合实际示例讲解 FreeBSD 内核驱动接口。对于希望在 FreeBSD 上编写或贡献驱动的开发者，这是有价值的参考。

items.title_en: Security through obscurity is not bad
items.title_zh: 安全性并非来自暴露：隐藏策略也有价值
items.summary_en: A provocative take arguing that obscurity, used judiciously, can complement strong security practices rather than replace them. It discusses how limited visibility can reduce attack surfaces, protect IP, and buy time against adversaries.
items.summary_zh: 作者主张在恰当时机下的隐藏/保密可以与强安全措施互补，而不是取代它们。文中指出有限的可见性可降低攻击面、保护知识产权，并为防御赢得时间。

items.title_en: After dissing Anthropic for limiting Mythos, OpenAI restricts access to Cyber
items.title_zh: 在批评 Anthropic 限制 Mythos 之后，OpenAI 也收紧了 Cyber 的访问
items.summary_en: OpenAI tightened access to the Cyber model following public criticism of Anthropic's Mythos restrictions, signaling growing caution around model availability and safety policy. The move underscores the competitive tensions in AI developer ecosystems and how governance debates influence access to powerful tools.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 在公开批评 Anthropic 对 Mythos 限制后，进一步收紧对 Cyber 模型的访问，显示出对模型可得性和安全政策的日趋谨慎。这凸显了 AI 开发者生态的竞争格局，以及治理议题如何影响对强大工具的访问。

items.title_en: Ask HN: Who wants to be hired? (May 2026)
items.title_zh: Ask HN：谁想被雇用？（2026年5月）
items.summary_en: A community thread invites people to share that they want to be hired, reflecting a candid snapshot of the 2026 tech job market on Hacker News. It surfaces what roles, compensation, and work setups candidates are prioritizing as demand persists.
items.summary_zh: HN 的一个提问帖子邀请人们表达求职意愿，折射出2026 年科技求职市场的直观图景。讨论揭示候选人对哪些岗位、薪资和工作方式的偏好，以及市场需求的趋势。

items.title_en: CJIT: C, Just in Time
items.title_zh: CJIT：C 语言的即时编译
items.summary_en: CJIT introduces a Just-In-Time approach to C, aiming to accelerate development cycles and experiments while preserving performance.
items.summary_zh: CJIT 将 C 语言带入即时编译范畴，提升开发迭代速度与尝试的效率，同时保持性能潜力。文中探讨了设计取舍、安 性性考量及快速 C 工具的潜在应用场景。

items.title_en: Ramp's Sheets AI Exfiltrates Financials
items.title_zh: Ramp 的 Sheets AI 外泄财务数据
items.summary_en: A security write-up shows Ramp's Sheets AI leaking financial data, illustrating how AI-assisted features in spreadsheets can introduce data exfiltration risks. It emphasizes robust data governance, access controls, and guardrails when deploying AI tools in finance.
items.summary_zh: 安全研究指出 Ramp 的 Sheets AI 可能会外泄财务数据，揭示在电子表格中加入 AI 功能会带来数据外泄风险。强调在金融场景部署 AI 工具时加强数据治理、访问控制和安全边界。

items.title_en: How I leared what a decoupling capacitor is for, the hard way
items.title_zh: 我在硬件實作中硬生生學會去耦電容的用途
items.summary_en: A hands-on electronics tale that reveals why decoupling capacitors matter for stable power rails. The piece shares practical lessons on layout, placement, and component choice to prevent power-related issues.
items.summary_zh: 一個實作經驗的電子故事，揭示去耦電容對穩定電源的重要性。文中分享佈局、放置與元件選型的實用教訓，避免電源相關問題。

items.title_en: Uber wants to turn its drivers into a sensor grid for self-driving companies
items.title_zh: Uber 想把司机变成自驾传感器网
items.summary_en: Uber envisions turning its driver fleet into a distributed sensor grid for autonomous vehicle developers, monetizing real-world data and test trips. The plan could accelerate AV iteration but raises questions about driver consent, data governance, and regulatory risk.
items.summary_zh: Uber 正在设想把司机队伍变成分布式传感器网，用于自动驾驶开发商的数据采集与测试并实现商业化。此举可能加速自动驾驶的迭代，但也引发对司机同意、数据治理和监管风险的担忧。

items.title_en: To Restore an Island Paradise, Add Fungi
items.title_zh: 为修复岛屿天堂，添加真菌
items.summary_en: Yale Environment Research highlights that introducing fungi can improve soil formation, vegetation, and resilience on atolls facing sea-level rise. By boosting nutrient cycling and soil stability, fungi offer a practical tool for climate adaptation in vulnerable island ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: 耶鲁环境研究强调，在面临海平面上升的环礁岛屿上添加真菌，可以改善土壤形成、植被覆盖与生态韧性。通过提升养分循环和土壤稳定性，真菌为脆弱岛屿环境的气候适应提供了切实可行的工具。

items.title_en: Show HN: State of the Art of Coding Models, According to Hacker News Commenters
items.title_zh: Show HN：据 Hacker News 评论者所评的编码模型现状
items.summary_en: This Show HN compiles Hacker News commenters' views to map the current state-of-the-art in coding models. It highlights which models are favored for code tasks, trade-offs between speed and accuracy, and community sentiment shaping practical tool choices.
items.summary_zh: 此 Show HN 汇总 Hacker News 评论者的观点，勾勒当前编码模型的现状，揭示在代码任务中的偏好模型、速度与准确度的权衡，以及社区对工具选择的影响。

items.title_en: US–Indian space mission maps extreme subsidence in Mexico City
items.title_zh: 美印太空任务绘制墨西哥城极端下沉图
items.summary_en: A US-Indian space mission mapped extreme subsidence in Mexico City, highlighting rapid ground sinking driven by groundwater extraction and urban growth. The findings underline the vulnerability of infrastructure and the need for sustainable water management and adaptive urban planning.
items.summary_zh: 美印合作的太空任务绘制出墨西哥城的极端下沉区域，揭示因地下水抽取和快速城市化导致的地面下沉。研究结果凸显基建脆弱性，强调需要加强水资源管理和宜居的城市规划来降低风险。

items.title_en: A report on burnout in open source software communities (2025) [pdf]
items.title_zh: 2025 年开源软件社区倦怠报告（PDF）
items.summary_en: 2025 report on burnout in open source communities reveals sustained fatigue among maintainers and contributors, driven by burnout, high release tempo, and funding gaps. It argues for sustainable governance, paid maintainers, and healthier collaboration practices to keep OSS healthy.
items.summary_zh: 2025 年的开源社区倦怠报告揭示维护者与贡献者长期疲惫，原因包括高密度的发行节奏和资金不足。报告主张通过可持续治理、付费维护者以及更健康的协作方式来维护开源生态的长期活力。

items.title_en: Quirks of Human Anatomy
items.title_zh: 人体解剖学的怪癖
items.summary_en: An exploration of quirks in human anatomy—from rare variations to unusual features—that challenge standard textbook narratives. The discussion underscores how exceptions inform medical understanding and education.
items.summary_zh: 介绍人体解剖中的罕见变异与有趣特征，挑战标准教材的叙述。强调这些例外对医学理解与教育的启示。

items.title_en: Clojurists Together – Q2 2026 Open Source Funding Announcement
items.title_zh: Clojurists Together – 2026 年 Q2 开源资助公告
items.summary_en: Clojurists Together announces Q2 2026 open-source funding, detailing grants to several projects in the Clojure ecosystem. The funding signals continued community support for open-source Lisp ecosystems and could accelerate maintenance and feature development.
items.summary_zh: Clojurists Together 公布 2026 年 Q2 的开源资助计划，对若干 Clojure 生态项目给予资助。这反映社区对开源 Lisp 生态的持续支持，可能推动维护与新特性的开发。

items.title_en: Letting AI play my game – building an agentic test harness to help play-testing
items.title_zh: 让 AI 玩我的游戏：构建一个具代理能力的测试框架以辅助试玩测试
items.summary_en: An experimental harness lets AI autonomously play a game, surfacing bugs and player-experience insights that human testers might miss. The setup discusses how to measure agentic play, handle non-determinism, and translate findings into test and design improvements.
items.summary_zh: 一个实验性框架让 AI 自动试玩游戏，能暴露人类测试难以发现的漏洞和体验问题。该方法涉及如何衡量代理行为、处理非确定性，并把发现转化为测试与设计改进。

items.title_en: Good developers learn to program. Most courses teach a language
items.title_zh: 好开发者会学会编程。大多数课程教的是一种语言
items.summary_en: Great developers are defined by their ability to think like programmers, not by knowing a single language. The piece argues that most courses teach syntax rather than core concepts, urging learners to focus on problem-solving, abstraction, and cross-language practice.
items.summary_zh: 优秀开发者的核心在于具备编程思维，而非掌握某一种语言。文章指出多数课程教授的是语法而非核心概念，建议学习者专注于问题解决、抽象能力以及跨语言练习。

items.title_en: DataCenter.FM – background noise app featuring the sound of the AI bubble
items.title_zh: DataCenter.FM – 背景噪音应用，带来 AI 泡沫的声音
items.summary_en: A background-noise app that channels the AI hype cycle through sound design. It comments on how tech industry chatter shapes perceptions of AI progress.
items.summary_zh: DataCenter.FM 提供一个背景噪音应用，通过 AI 热潮的声音与气氛来反映科技行业的讨论氛围，揭示了 hype 循环如何影响开发者和投资者的情绪。

items.title_en: How to Build the Future: Demis Hassabis [video]
items.title_zh: 如何构建未来：Demis Hassabis（视频）
items.summary_en: In this talk with Demis Hassabis, the DeepMind cofounder lays out a long-term, responsible path for AI progress, balancing ambition with safeguards and societal impact. It offers a candid perspective on what it takes to build transformative AI responsibly.
items.summary_zh: 在这段对话中，DeepMind 联合创始人 Demis Hassabis 描绘了 AI 发展中的长期、负责任路径，强调野心与安全防护并重。提供了关于如何负责任地打造具变革性的 AI 的直观观点。

items.title_en: Withnail's Coat and I
items.title_zh: Withnail 的大衣与我
items.summary_en: A personal piece exploring the intersections of fashion, memory, and tech culture.
items.summary_zh: 一篇个人文章，探讨时尚、记忆与科技文化的交汇。

items.title_en: Advanced Quantization Algorithm for LLMs
items.title_zh: 面向大语言模型的高级量化算法
items.summary_en: Auto-Round introduces a sophisticated quantization approach for large language models, preserving accuracy while shrinking model size and speeding up inference. The technique promises meaningful efficiency gains for CPU/GPU deployment and lowers the cost of running large models.
items.summary_zh: Auto-Round 提出了一种面向大语言模型的高级量化方法，在不显著损失精度的前提下缩小模型规模并加速推理。该技术有望在 CPU/GPU 部署中带来显著的效率提升，降低大模型的运营成本。

items.title_en: Spanish archaeologists discover trove of ancient shipwrecks in Bay of Gibraltar
items.title_zh: 西班牙考古学家在直布罗陀湾发现大量古代船骸
items.summary_en: Spanish archaeologists have uncovered a trove of ancient shipwrecks in the Bay of Gibraltar, expanding our view of maritime history. The discoveries leverage modern underwater methods—like sonar mapping and remotely operated equipment—to document and preserve the wrecks. The find adds rich data for historians and may inform ancient trade network studies.
items.summary_zh: 西班牙考古学家在直布罗陀湾发现了一批古代船只残骸，扩展了对海上贸易历史的认知。此次发现依托现代水下探测手段，如声纳制图和远程操作设备，对船骸进行记录与保护。研究成果为历史学家提供新的证据，也可能揭示当时的贸易网络。

items.title_en: Bad Connection: Global telecom exploitation by covert surveillance actors
items.title_zh: 全球电信被隐秘监控行动者利用的安全漏洞
items.summary_en: A global study reveals covert surveillance actors repeatedly exploit telecom infrastructure to monitor people, challenging privacy and security norms. The report maps tactics, targets, and calls for stronger safeguards and accountability.
items.summary_zh: 全球性研究揭示隐蔽监控者反复利用电信基础设施进行监控，威胁隐私与网络安全。报告梳理了攻击手段和目标，并呼吁加强防护与问责。

items.title_en: NPM website was down
items.title_zh: NPM 网站宕机
items.summary_en: An outage hit the NPM registry, interrupting package publishing and installs for JavaScript/Node developers. The incident highlights the fragility of centralized ecosystems and the importance of robust incident response.
items.summary_zh: NPM 注册表发生宕机，影响 JavaScript/Node 开发者的包发布与安装。事件凸显集中式生态的脆弱性以及对强健应急响应的需求。

items.title_en: Using "underdrawings" for accurate text and numbers
items.title_zh: 使用 underdrawings 实现文本与数字的精确对齐
items.summary_en: Explains how underdrawings help align annotations with final drawings and diagrams, outlining workflows for overlaying text and numbers to improve documentation accuracy, revision control, and QA.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 how underdrawings 如何帮助将注释与最终图纸对齐，概述在图解上叠加文本与数字的工作流程，从而提升文档准确性、版本控制和质量检查。

items.title_en: Deep under Antarctic ice, a long-predicted cosmic whisper breaks through
items.title_zh: 深埋南极冰层之下，长期预期的宇宙低语终于浮现
items.summary_en: Astronomers report a detection of a long-predicted cosmic signal deep beneath the Antarctic ice, validating a key theoretical piece of astrophysics. The breakthrough demonstrates the power of polar detectors for studying high-energy phenomena and could open new multi-messenger opportunities.
items.summary_zh: 研究者在南极冰层深处探测到长期预测的宇宙信号，验证了天体物理学中的一个关键理论。此发现展示了极地探测在研究高能现象方面的潜力，并可能开启新的多信使观测机会。

items.title_en: Nuclear receptor 4A1 linked to health effects of coffee: study
items.title_zh: 咖啡与健康：NR4A1 与咖啡健康效应的关联研究
items.summary_en: A study links nuclear receptor NR4A1 to observed health effects from coffee consumption, suggesting molecular pathways that influence metabolism and inflammation. The finding helps explain why coffee impacts people differently and could guide personalized nutrition.
items.summary_zh: 研究发现核受体 NR4A1 与咖啡摄入的健康效应相关，提示可能影响代谢和炎症的分子通路。研究有助于解释个体对咖啡反应的差异，并为个性化营养提供线索。

items.title_en: Carrot Disclosure: Forgejo
items.title_zh: Forgejo 的 carrot 信息披露
items.summary_en: A security disclosure about Forgejo, highlighting a vulnerability or exposure and its potential impact on repositories, plus recommended mitigations and fixes.
items.summary_zh: 关于 Forgejo 的安全披露，指出了某一漏洞或暴露点及其对代码仓库的潜在影响，并给出缓解措施与修复方向。

items.title_en: Group averages obscure how an individual's brain controls behavior: study
items.title_zh: 群体平均掩盖个人大脑对行为的控制方式：研究
items.summary_en: The study finds that averaging brain data across groups hides how an individual brain maps to behavior. Individual-level analyses reveal patterns that group means miss, challenging one-size-fits-all interpretations. The work supports personalized brain models and cautions against over-reliance on group averages in neuroscience.
items.summary_zh: 这项研究发现，将大脑数据按组平均会掩盖个体脑部如何映射到行为的方式。个体级分析揭示了群体均值所忽略的模式，挑战了“一个方案适用于所有人”的解读。研究强调需要建立个性化的大脑模型，并警示不要过度依赖群体平均数据。

items.title_en: If I could make my own GitHub
items.title_zh: 如果我能做自己的 GitHub
items.summary_en: Explores building a GitHub-like platform from scratch, weighing open-source, self-hosting, feature scope, and governance trade-offs. It offers practical design considerations for developers aiming to create developer tooling with community ownership.
items.summary_zh: 探讨从零构建一个类似 GitHub 的平台，权衡开源、自托管、功能边界和治理等要点。提供面向开发者工具的实际设计建议，强调社区所有权与可持续性。

items.title_en: London to Calcutta by Bus (2022)
items.title_zh: 从伦敦到加尔各答的公路之旅（2022）
items.summary_en: A 2022 overland journey by bus from London to Calcutta documents the logistical and border-crossing challenges of long-distance travel by land. The piece contrasts slow, overland travel with the ubiquity of flying, highlighting route choices, time costs, and intercultural encounters along the way.
items.summary_zh: 2022年一场横跨欧洲至亚洲的公路巴士旅程记录了长途陆路旅行的后勤与边境挑战。文章对比了陆路旅行与飞行的差异，强调路线选择、时间成本以及沿途的跨文化体验。

items.title_en: Greece to ban anonymity on social media
items.title_zh: 希腊将全面禁止社交媒体匿名性
items.summary_en: Greece moves to ban anonymity on social platforms to curb abuse, raising civil-liberties concerns and enforcement questions.
items.summary_zh: 希腊计划在社交媒体上禁止匿名，意在打击虚假信息与滥用行为，需权衡公民自由与执行难题。

items.title_en: Show HN: Pollen – distributed WASM runtime, no control plane, single binary
items.title_zh: Pollen：分布式 WASM 运行时，无控制平面，单一二进制
items.summary_en: Pollen provides a distributed WebAssembly runtime in a single binary with no central control plane, aiming to reduce orchestration overhead and improve portability across nodes.
items.summary_zh: Pollen 提供一个单一二进制、无中心控制平面的分布式 WASM 运行时，旨在降低编排开销并提升节点间的可移植性。

items.title_en: Claude for Creative Work
items.title_zh: Claude 在创意工作中的应用
items.summary_en: Anthropic positions Claude as a tool for creative workflows, from drafting and brainstorming to refining ideas.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 将 Claude 定位为创意工作流程中的工具，覆盖从起草、头脑风暴到润色想法等环节。文章强调风格控制、模板等功能，阐明 Claude 在协作创作中的独特价值。

items.title_en: The 'Hidden' Costs of Great Abstractions
items.title_zh: 伟大抽象背后的隐藏成本
items.summary_en: Turns a critical eye to high-level abstractions, showing how they can hide costs like performance overhead, debugging complexity, and maintenance burdens. Encourages mindful design choices that expose true costs.
items.summary_zh: 批判性地审视高层抽象，揭示它们可能隐藏的成本，如性能开销、调试复杂性和维护负担。倡导在设计时对真实成本有清晰认识并做出谨慎选择。

items.title_en: Softmax, can you derive the Jacobian? And should you care?
items.title_zh: Softmax：能推导雅可比矩阵吗？是否值得关心？
items.summary_en: The post derives the Jacobian of the Softmax function and discusses its relevance for practical machine learning. While the Jacobian is dense and coupled, understanding it helps diagnose gradient flow in multi-class models and informs numerical implementation choices. The takeaway is that Softmax’s interactions across outputs matter more than they appear at first glance.
items.summary_zh: 文章推导了 Softmax 的雅可比矩阵，并讨论其在实际机器学习中的作用。虽然雅可比矩阵很稠密且耦合，但理解它有助于诊断多分类模型的梯度流动，并为数值实现提供指引。要点在于输出之间的耦合关系比初看时更为重要。

items.title_en: I Got Sick of Remembering Port Numbers
items.title_zh: 我终于厌倦了记端口号
items.summary_en: Port numbers are a hassle; the post shares approaches to avoid memorizing them, such as using service discovery, DNS aliases, or local routing tricks. It argues for more ergonomic development workflows in networked services.
items.summary_zh: 端口号记忆麻烦，文中分享通过服务发现、DNS 别名或本地路由等方式来避免记住端口号的方法，主张让开发者在网络服务中拥有更高效的工作流。

items.title_en: Ubuntu servers taken offline by "sustained, cross-border attack"
items.title_zh: Ubuntu 服务器因持续的跨境攻击而离线
items.summary_en: Ubuntu infrastructure suffered a sustained cross-border attack causing network outages and downtime, highlighting the fragility of open-source service ecosystems and the need for resilient incident response.
items.summary_zh: Ubuntu 基础设施遭遇持续性的跨境攻击，导致服务离线并停机。事件凸显开源服务生态系统的脆弱性以及对更强韧的事件响应能力的需求。

items.title_en: Show HN: GhostBox – Borrow a disposable little machine from the Global Free Tier
items.title_zh: Show HN：GhostBox——从全球免费层借用的一次性小机器
items.summary_en: GhostBox is a concept to borrow a disposable micro-machine from a 'Global Free Tier' to run ephemeral experiments, illustrating a model for low-commitment hardware access and experimentation.
items.summary_zh: GhostBox 是一个从全球免费资源借用一次性小型机器的概念，旨在让用户以低成本、短期的方式进行硬件实验，推动无锁定成本的试用模式。

items.title_en: Show HN: Rocky – Rust SQL engine with branches, replay, column lineage
items.title_zh: Show HN：Rocky——具分支、回放与列级血缘的 Rust SQL 引擎
items.summary_en: Rocky is a Rust-based SQL engine with support for branches, query replay, and column lineage. It aims to be embeddable and auditable, enabling reproducible results and fine-grained data provenance for data pipelines.
items.summary_zh: Rocky 是一个用 Rust 编写的 SQL 引擎，支持分支、查询回放和列级血缘。目标是可嵌入、可审计，适合需要可重复结果和细粒度数据血缘的数据管线场景。

items.title_en: Refusal in Language Models Is Mediated by a Single Direction
items.title_zh: 语言模型的拒绝响应由单一方向主导
items.summary_en: A study suggests refusals in language models are mediated by a single direction in input space, offering a new lens on prompt design and alignment risks. This could guide safer prompt engineering and model tuning.
items.summary_zh: 研究表明语言模型的拒绝输出受输入空间中一个单一方向的调控，为提示设计与对齐风险提供了新视角，或将引导更安全的提示工程与模型调优。

items.title_en: A physics engine with incremental rollback for multiplayer games
items.title_zh: 具增量回滚的多人游戏物理引擎
items.summary_en: A physics engine for multiplayer games uses incremental rollback to keep simulations in sync with low latency. The approach improves determinism and reduces perceived lag in competitive or streaming multiplayer experiences.
items.summary_zh: 这款多人游戏物理引擎通过增量回滚来保持同步、降低延迟，提升对等竞技与流式多人体验中的确定性与流畅感。

items.title_en: Sally McKee, who coined the term "the memory wall", has died
items.title_zh: 提出“记忆墙”一词的 Sally McKee 去世
items.summary_en: Tributes to Sally McKee, who coined the term 'memory wall,' recognizing her influence on computer architecture and memory systems. Her work helped frame how memory bandwidth and hierarchy shape performance.
items.summary_zh: 向提出“记忆墙”一词的 Sally McKee 致敬，肯定她在计算机体系结构与内存系统方面的影响。她的工作帮助人们把内存带宽与层级对性能的影响纳入讨论。

items.title_en: Claude.ai and API unavailable [fixed]
items.title_zh: Claude.ai API 中断（已修复）
items.summary_en: Claude.ai experienced an API outage that affected access to its services, with the incident subsequently resolved. The status update provides details on the root cause and remediation steps.
items.summary_zh: Claude.ai 遭遇 API 暂时不可用，影响服务访问，已修复。状态更新给出故障原因与改进措施。

items.title_en: What can we gain by losing infinity?
items.title_zh: 我们能通过失去无限获得什么？
items.summary_en: Explores how embracing finitary approaches or truncating infinite concepts can yield new mathematical or computational insights. The piece ties abstract ideas to practical gains in computation, physics, or philosophy, showing that shedding the ideal of infinity can lead to usable approximations or new theories. It emphasizes the value of finite models in tackling real-world problems.
items.summary_zh: 探讨在将无限概念简化或接受有限化时，如何带来新的数学或计算洞见。文章将抽象理念与计算、物理或哲学的实际应用联系起来，展示放弃无限理想能带来可用的近似或新理论，强调有限模型在现实问题中的价值。

items.title_en: Alert-driven monitoring
items.title_zh: 基于告警驱动的监控
items.summary_en: Alert-Driven Monitoring describes a monitoring approach where alerts guide the instrumentation and response workflows. It argues for designing actionable alerts with clear runbooks and automation to reduce noise and speed incident containment. The concept complements existing metrics dashboards by focusing on what actually requires action.
items.summary_zh: 告警驱动的监控将告警作为驱动，将监控的编排和响应流程引导。主张以可操作的告警、清晰的处置手册与自动化为设计核心，以减少噪声并提升事件处置速度。该理念与现有的指标仪表板互补，聚焦于真正需要采取行动的场景。

items.title_en: Porsche will contest Laguna Seca in historic colors of the Apple Computer livery
items.title_zh: 保时捷将在拉古纳塞卡以 Apple 电脑专属历史涂装参赛
items.summary_en: Porsche will race Laguna Seca in historic Apple Computer livery colors, reviving a retro branding moment on the track. The retro aesthetic underscores how branding and color stories influence fan engagement and media coverage in motorsport.
items.summary_zh: 保时捷将在拉古纳塞卡以苹果电脑专属历史涂装参赛，重现昔日品牌形象。此举展示了品牌色彩在赛车赛事中的传播力和对观众参与度、媒体关注的影响。

items.title_en: A more efficient implementation of Shor's algorithm
items.title_zh: 更高效的 Shor 算法实现
items.summary_en: A more efficient implementation of Shor's algorithm advances quantum factoring, potentially requiring fewer qubits or tolerating less error. The development nudges the threshold for breaking certain cryptosystems and underscores the urgency of post-quantum cryptography research.
items.summary_zh: Shor 算法的更高效实现提升了量子因子分解的资源效率，可能用更少的量子比特或更低的误差完成运算。对技术人员而言，这意味着需要更快推进后量子密码学研究。

items.title_en: Creating a Color Palette from an Image
items.title_zh: 从图片创建调色板
items.summary_en: Extracting a color palette from an image shows how simple algorithms like k-means can capture dominant hues for design or UI theming. The post walks through a practical approach and showcases several resulting palettes.
items.summary_zh: 从图片中提取调色板演示了如 k-means 等简单算法如何捕捉主色，用于设计或界面主题。文章给出实用步骤并展示若干示例调色板。

items.title_en: Dear friend, you have built a Kubernetes (2024)
items.title_zh: 亲爱的朋友，你已经构建了一个 Kubernetes（2024）
items.summary_en: A reflective piece about the perception and responsibility of operating Kubernetes-like systems, highlighting the complexity and maintenance costs of Kubernetes and urging simpler architectures or clearer ownership.
items.summary_zh: 文章用幽默笔触反思若你自称‘构建了 Kubernetes’的说法背后的责任感，强调 Kubernetes 等系统的复杂性与运维代价。

items.title_en: Running local LLMs offline on a ten-hour flight
items.title_zh: 十小时飞行中离线运行本地大语言模型
items.summary_en: A practical look at running local LLMs offline during a ten-hour flight, detailing model size choices, quantization, memory footprint, and battery considerations. It demonstrates that with careful optimization, on-device inference is increasingly feasible for travelers and privacy-minded users.
items.summary_zh: 文章展示在十小时飞行中离线运行本地大语言模型的做法，涵盖模型尺寸、量化、内存占用和电池考虑等要点。通过对这些权衡的说明，显示了在设备端推理在旅行场景下的可行性正在提升。

items.title_en: Apple Says Mac Studio and Mac Mini Will Be in Short Supply for Months
items.title_zh: 苹果称 Mac Studio 与 Mac Mini 将在数月内短缺
items.summary_en: Apple has announced that Mac Studio and Mac Mini will be in short supply for months, signaling ongoing supply-chain constraints despite strong demand. The shortage could affect buyers, developers, and upgrade plans, and hints at broader pressures in the semiconductor and logistics ecosystem. It may impact pacing of new product workflows and budgeting for teams.
items.summary_zh: 苹果宣布 Mac Studio 和 Mac Mini 将在数月内短缺，表明需求强劲下供应链仍然受限。缺货可能影响买家、开发者及升级计划，也反映出半导体与物流生态的更广泛压力，或将影响团队的工作节奏与预算分配。

items.title_en: Show HN: DAC – open-source dashboard as code tool for agents and humans
items.title_zh: Show HN: DAC——代理人与人类的开源仪表板即代码工具
items.summary_en: DAC is an open-source tool that treats dashboards as code, enabling agents and humans to collaborate on dashboards programmatically. It emphasizes reproducibility and automation in analytics workflows.
items.summary_zh: DAC 是一个开源工具，将仪表板视为代码，使代理人与人类能够以编程方式协作创建仪表板，强调分析工作流的可重复性与自动化。

items.title_en: Agentic AI systems violate the implicit assumptions of database design
items.title_zh: 代理性 AI 系统违反数据库设计的隐性假设
items.summary_en: Agentic AI systems challenge implicit database design assumptions, raising concerns about data integrity, governance, and accountability as autonomous agents access and modify data.
items.summary_zh: 代理性 AI 系统挑战数据库设计中的隐性假设，引发对数据完整性、治理与问责的关注，尤其在自治代理访问和修改数据时。

items.title_en: 200 Journalists Applaud the Internet Archive's Role in Preserving Public Record
items.title_zh: 200 名记者称赞互联网档案馆在保存公共记录中的作用
items.summary_en: A piece highlighting how journalists laud the Internet Archive for preserving public records and ensuring access amid platform changes. It underscores archival resilience as a shield for journalism.
items.summary_zh: 报道记者们称赞互联网档案馆在保存公共记录并确保在平台变动中仍可访问方面的作用，强调档案性对新闻工作的韧性与保障。

items.title_en: The Mushroom That Makes People Have the Exact Same Hallucination
items.title_zh: 让人产生完全相同幻觉的蘑菇
items.summary_en: A psychedelic mushroom is said to produce strikingly similar visions across different people, prompting questions about shared perceptual effects and the neuroscience of psychedelics. The piece weighs anecdotal reports against scientific explanations and safety considerations.
items.summary_zh: 据称这种致幻蘑菇能让不同个体产生高度一致的幻觉。文章探讨了在致幻剂作用下，共同知觉现象如何产生，以及这对大脑处理信息的启示，同时考虑科学解释与安全性。

items.title_en: LLMs Are Not a Higher Level of Abstraction
items.title_zh: LLMs 不是更高层次的抽象
items.summary_en: Contends that large language models are not simply a new abstraction layer; they introduce novel failure modes, data leakage risks, and demand new cost, latency, and reliability considerations.
items.summary_zh: 主张大型语言模型并非只是新的一层抽象，它们带来新的故障模式、数据泄露风险，并需要在成本、延迟与可靠性方面采取新策略。

items.title_en: Whimsical Animations Course Open House
items.title_zh: Whimsical Animations 课程开放日
items.summary_en: Josh Comeau's Whimsical Animations course opens its doors for an open house, inviting developers to preview the curriculum and see practical animation techniques. It emphasizes practical, performant animation patterns for the web.
items.summary_zh: Josh Comeau 的《Whimsical Animations》课程开放日邀请开发者预览课程大纲，了解实用的网页动画技巧。课程强调在保持性能的前提下实现富有趣味性的动画。

items.title_en: Snowball Earth may hide a far stranger climate cycle than anyone expected
items.title_zh: 雪球地球理论可能隐藏比预期更古怪的气候循环
items.summary_en: New climate research suggests Snowball Earth could involve more intricate climate cycles than previously imagined, implying a richer set of feedback mechanisms governing global glaciation and deglaciation.
items.summary_zh: 最新气候研究表明，雪球地球现象可能包含比以往设想更复杂的气候循环，意味着全球冰川化与退冰过程背后有更丰富的反馈机制。

items.title_en: The FCC is about to ban 21% of its test labs today. I mapped them all
items.title_zh: FCC 将禁用 21% 的测试实验室：完整映射结果
items.summary_en: An analysis reveals the FCC will ban 21% of its accredited test labs, with a complete map of the labs. The write-up discusses potential impacts on device certification timelines and QA in the hardware ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: 文中披露 FCC 将禁止 21% 的经认证测试实验室，并对所有实验室进行了完整映射。对设备认证进度和硬件质量控制可能带来影响，凸显了解实验室网络全貌的重要性。

items.title_en: Linux 7.0 Broke PostgreSQL: The Preemption Regression Explained
items.title_zh: Linux 7.0 破坏 PostgreSQL：抢占回归解析
items.summary_en: The article explains a preemption regression introduced in Linux 7.0 that negatively affected PostgreSQL workloads, leading to latency and performance issues. It also discusses mitigations and how to navigate the problem while awaiting fixes.
items.summary_zh: 文章解释了 Linux 7.0 引入的抢占回归对 PostgreSQL 工作负载的负面影响，导致延迟和性能问题。还讨论了缓解方案以及在等待修复时的应对之道。

items.title_en: Google banks on AI edge to catch up to cloud rivals Amazon and Microsoft
items.title_zh: 谷歌押注 AI 边缘以追赶云竞争对手
items.summary_en: Reports that Google is betting on AI edge computing to close the gap with Amazon and Microsoft, aiming to reduce latency, boost privacy-preserving inference, and unlock new workloads at the edge. The strategy signals a shift toward hybrid cloud and on-device intelligence.
items.summary_zh: 报道指出谷歌正在押注 AI 边缘计算以缩短与 AWS、Microsoft 的差距，目标是降低延迟、提升隐私保护推理能力，并在边缘释放新工作负载。这一策略预示云端与边缘融合、以及设备内智能的新趋势。

items.title_en: Flue is a TypeScript framework for building the next generation of agents
items.title_zh: Flue：用 TypeScript 构建新一代智能体的框架
items.summary_en: Flue positions itself as a TypeScript framework to build agents, offering modular composition and a focus on deterministic, testable behavior. For developers exploring AI agents and orchestration in the JS/TS ecosystem, it could become a lightweight alternative to Python-based tooling.
items.summary_zh: Flue 将自己定位为用 TypeScript 构建智能体的框架，强调模块化组合和可预测、可测试的行为。对于在 JS/TS 生态中探索 AI 智能体与编排的开发者，可能成为 Python 生态之外的轻量替代方案。

items.title_en: Show HN: Perfect Bluetooth MIDI for Windows
items.title_zh: Show HN：Windows 上的完美蓝牙 MIDI
items.summary_en: Windows finally achieves reliable Bluetooth MIDI performance with low latency and stable throughput, comparable to native platforms.
items.summary_zh: Windows 的蓝牙 MIDI 性能实现了稳定低延迟，与原生平台相当。该进展提升了 Windows 上的跨平台音乐工作流，解决长期存在的兼容性难题。

items.title_en: Show HN: Utilyze – an open source GPU monitoring tool more accurate than nvtop
items.title_zh: Show HN：Utilyze——一个比 nvtop 更准的开源 GPU 监控工具
items.summary_en: Show HN highlights Utilyze, an open-source GPU monitoring tool claimed to outperform nvtop in accuracy, offering more precise GPU usage and thermals data.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 介绍 Utilyze，这是一个开源 GPU 监控工具，声称在精确度上优于 nvtop，提供更准确的 GPU 使用和温控数据。

items.title_en: Getting my daily news from a dot matrix printer 2024
items.title_zh: 在 2024 年用点阵打印机获取每日新闻
items.summary_en: An experimental diary-like piece about consuming daily news via a dot-matrix printer in 2024, blending nostalgia with commentary on information delivery, redundancy, and resilience.
items.summary_zh: 以日记式的形式记录在 2024 年通过点阵打印机获取每日新闻的尝试，混合着对信息传递方式、冗余性与韧性的反思。

items.title_en: What is Z-Angle Memory and why is Intel developing it?
items.title_zh: 什么是 Z-Angle Memory？英特尔为何在开发它？
items.summary_en: Z-Angle Memory is a novel memory concept being explored by Intel to improve data access patterns for HPC workloads. It hints at potential gains in bandwidth, latency, and energy efficiency, while outlining engineering challenges to bring it to production.
items.summary_zh: Z-Angle Memory 是英特尔在探索的新型内存理念，旨在改善高性能计算工作负载的数据访问模式。其潜在收益包括带宽、延迟和能效的提升，同时也面临实现上的技术挑战。

items.title_en: The Church Rock Uranium Mill Spill
items.title_zh: Church Rock 铀矿厂泄漏事故
items.summary_en: A 1979 uranium mill spill at Church Rock released large amounts of radioactive waste into the desert; it's one of the worst nuclear incidents in US history. It underscores legacy pollution and regulatory challenges in mining and energy sectors, with lessons for tech and policy.
items.summary_zh: Church Rock 铀矿厂在 1979 年发生严重的放射性废料泄漏，成为美国历史上最严重的核事故之一。此事揭示了矿业与能源领域的遗留污染与监管挑战，对科技与政策具有长期影响。

items.title_en: Little magazines are back
items.title_zh: 小型杂志正在回归
items.summary_en: A renaissance of small, independent magazines is underway, fueled by digital distribution and niche communities.
items.summary_zh: 小型独立杂志正在复兴，借助数字发行与细分读者群找到了可持续性与新受众。

items.title_en: Text-to-CAD
items.title_zh: 文本转 CAD
items.summary_en: A project that converts natural language prompts into CAD models, enabling rapid ideation and iteration without traditional drafting. It highlights the merging of AI-assisted design with engineering tooling.
items.summary_zh: 一个将自然语言提示转换为 CAD 模型的项目，帮助快速产生与迭代设计，展示了 AI 辅助设计与工程工具的融合趋势。

items.title_en: Patch applies fake diffs from commit messages
items.title_zh: 补丁从提交信息中应用伪造的差异
items.summary_en: The phantom patch concept demonstrates applying fake diffs inferred from commit messages, underscoring risks of relying on textual metadata for code changes and potential security concerns.
items.summary_zh: 幻影补丁技术演示了基于提交信息推断并应用伪造差异的补丁工具，暴露了仅依赖文本元数据进行代码变更的风险及潜在安全隐患。

items.title_en: Investors pile into clean energy as Iran war drives push for energy security
items.title_zh: 在伊朗战争推动能源安全的背景下，投资者涌向清洁能源
items.summary_en: Investors are flocking to clean energy as geopolitical tensions push energy security higher on the agenda. The surge in funding spans renewables, storage, and grid resilience, with policy and market signals accelerating the transition. Geopolitics may expedite diversification away from fossil fuels and boost long-term climate and energy goals.
items.summary_zh: 在地缘政治紧张局势推动能源安全议程之际，投资者正涌向清洁能源。资金涌向可再生能源、储能与电网韧性建设，政策与市场信号正在加速能源转型。地缘政治因素可能加速对化石燃料的多元化依赖，推动长期气候与能源目标的实现。

items.title_en: Virtualisation on Apple Silicon Macs is different
items.title_zh: 苹果 Silicon 的虚拟化有何不同
items.summary_en: Apple Silicon virtualization differs from x86, with ARM-based virtualization stacks and tighter integration with macOS.
items.summary_zh: 苹果 Silicon 的虚拟化与 x86 存在差异，依赖于 ARM 架构的虚拟化栈并与 macOS 的集成更紧密。文章详述实际差异、性能影响以及在 Apple Silicon 上运行虚拟机的实践要点。

items.title_en: Show HN: A terminal spreadsheet editor with Vim keybindings
items.title_zh: Show HN：一个带 Vim 键绑定的终端表格编辑器
items.summary_en: Show HN: A terminal spreadsheet editor with Vim keybindings demonstrates efficient data work entirely in the terminal, combining familiar editing ergonomics with lightweight, portable tooling.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：一个带有 Vim 键绑定的终端表格编辑器，展示了在终端内高效处理数据的能力，将熟悉的编辑习惯与轻量化工具结合起来。

items.title_en: Zugzwang
items.title_zh: Zugzwang（棋局困境）
items.summary_en: Zugzwang is a situation in which every legal move worsens the player's position, a concept widely used in game theory and algorithmic decision problems. Understanding it helps diagnose suboptimal strategies in adversarial environments.
items.summary_zh: Zugzwang 指的是在棋局中任何合法走法都会使持方处于不利局面的情形，广泛用于博弈论和算法决策问题。理解这一概念有助于分析对抗环境中的劣势决策。

items.title_en: Alphabet Announces First Quarter 2026 Results
items.title_zh: Alphabet 公布 2026 年第一季度业绩
items.summary_en: Alphabet reports its first-quarter 2026 results, with headwinds and growth areas in ads, Cloud, and AI initiatives. The release signals how the group is balancing investment in AI with efficiency, and sets expectations for investors.
items.summary_zh: Alphabet 公布 2026 年第一季度业绩，广告、云和人工智能等板块的表现成为关注点。财报揭示公司在 AI 投资与提效之间的平衡策略，并引导投资人对未来增长的预期。

items.title_en: Integrated by Design
items.title_zh: 以設計整合為原則
items.summary_en: Integrated by Design argues for integrating systems, teams, and processes from the outset. It offers pragmatic steps to align design, engineering, and product goals to avoid silos and accelerate delivery.
items.summary_zh: 以設計整合為原則主張在一開始就整合系統、團隊與流程，提供實用步驟，讓設計、工程與產品目標保持一致，避免孤島並加速交付。

items.title_en: Den stora Älgvandringen – The great moose migration (live)
items.title_zh: 大驼鹿迁徙直播
items.summary_en: Live coverage of the great moose migration offers real-time wildlife viewing and insights into Nordic ecosystems, blending nature storytelling with accessible science.
items.summary_zh: 这是对北欧地区野生动物迁徙的现场直播，提供实时的野生动物观察与对北欧生态系统的洞见，兼具自然讲解与科普价值。

items.title_en: Windows API is Successful Cross-Platform API (2024)
items.title_zh: Windows API 已成为成功的跨平台 API
items.summary_en: The Windows API has become a successful cross-platform API, reflecting how Windows interfaces and compatibility layers have become usable across different OSes. This trend affects how developers design cross-platform apps, reducing the need to rewrite for each platform and influencing porting strategies.
items.summary_zh: Windows API 已成为一个成功的跨平台接口，表明通过兼容层在不同操作系统上使用 Windows 接口已成为现实。此趋势正在影响开发者的跨平台设计与移植策略。

items.title_en: A 1960s art school experiment that redefined creativity
items.title_zh: 1960 年代美术学院的一场重新定义创造力的实验
items.summary_en: This piece surveys a 1960s art-school experiment that reshaped how people think about creativity, likely involving interactive pedagogy and cross-disciplinary collaboration. It offers takeaways for design, education, and tech teams about nurturing experimentation and breaking intellectual boundaries. The lesson is that curricula can unlock new modes of creative thinking when teachers embrace risk and collaboration.
items.summary_zh: 本文回顾了1960年代美术学院的一场实验，重新定义了人们对创造力的理解，往往涉及互动式教学与跨学科协作。为设计、教育乃至科技团队提供启示：在教师鼓励冒险与协作的条件下，课程能开启全新的创造力表达方式。

items.title_en: EvanFlow – A TDD driven feedback loop for Claude Code
items.title_zh: EvanFlow：面向 Claude Code 的测试驱动开发反馈循环
items.summary_en: EvanFlow uses TDD to drive feedback loop for Claude Code, enabling automated tests and regression checks. This approach helps steer prompt engineering and improve reliability of AI-generated code. It demonstrates how short, repeatable tests can guide model usage effectively.
items.summary_zh: EvanFlow 通过测试驱动开发推动 Claude Code 的反馈循环，支持自动化测试与回归检查。这种方法有助于引导提示工程并提升 AI 产出代码的可靠性，展示了如何用短小、可重复的测试来有效引导模型使用。

items.title_en: Unsigned sizes: A five year mistake
items.title_zh: 无符号大小的五年误解
items.summary_en: The piece argues that using unsigned integers to represent sizes leads to subtle bugs, security holes, and confusing APIs, citing five years of accumulated issues. It advocates safer abstractions or bounds-aware APIs to prevent common off-by-one and wraparound errors.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为用无符号整数表示大小容易引发细微的Bug、安全隐患与混乱的 API，并指出这些问题在五年内积累。文中倡议采用更安全的抽象或边界感知的 API，以避免越界和环绕等常见错误。

items.title_en: Auto Polo
items.title_zh: 自动马球
items.summary_en: Auto Polo is a historical experiment where drivers control cars on a polo field, blending early automotive tech with sport. The note covers its origins, rules, and why it stands as a curious footnote in the history of vehicles and games.
items.summary_zh: 自动马球是一项早期的实验性运动，驾驶员驾驶汽车在马球场上竞技，融合了汽车技术与体育趣味。文中回顾了起源、规则，以及其在汽车史与体育史中的有趣地位。

items.title_en: Monad Tutorials Timeline
items.title_zh: Monad 教程时间线
items.summary_en: The Monad Tutorials Timeline curates the history of teaching monads in the Haskell community, mapping key tutorials and their authors. It helps learners chart a path through one of programming's most influential concepts.
items.summary_zh: Monad 教程时间线整理了 Haskell 社区关于 Monad 教学的历史脉络，标注了关键教程与作者，帮助学习者梳理这一重要概念的学习路径。

items.title_en: Laguna XS.2 and M.1
items.title_zh: Laguna XS.2 与 M.1 深度解析
items.summary_en: Poolside AI provides a deeper dive into Laguna XS.2 and M.1, exploring architecture, performance, and how these designs affect inference workloads and pricing in practical terms.
items.summary_zh: Poolside AI 深度剖析 Laguna XS.2 与 M.1，聚焦性能特性、设计目标及对推理工作负载与定价的潜在影响。

items.title_en: K3k: Kubernetes in Kubernetes
items.title_zh: K3k：Kubernetes 内的 Kubernetes
items.summary_en: K3k demonstrates running Kubernetes inside a Kubernetes cluster, enabling nested clusters for testing, multi-tenancy, or edge scenarios.
items.summary_zh: K3k 展示在一个集群内再部署 Kubernetes，实现嵌套集群，便于测试、多租户和边缘场景的管理。

items.title_en: Court Rules 2nd Amendment Covers Firearms Parts Good News Those Who Build Guns
items.title_zh: 法院裁定第二修正案覆盖枪支部件——对制造枪支者有利
items.summary_en: A court ruling extends Second Amendment protections to firearm parts used to assemble weapons, signaling a shift in how DIY guns are regulated. The decision raises questions about serialization, regulation, and enforcement for component parts.
items.summary_zh: 法院裁定第二修正案也覆盖用于组装枪支的部件，这将影响DIY 枪支的监管方式。该判决引发关于零部件序列化、监管与执法的讨论。

items.title_en: Vera: a programming language designed for machines to write
items.title_zh: Vera：为机器编写代码而设计的编程语言
items.summary_en: Vera is a programming language aimed at machines writing code, exploring how automated generation can shape software development. Early experiments show potential for synthesis-driven workflows and new tooling paradigms.
items.summary_zh: Vera 是一门为“让机器去写代码”而设计的编程语言，研究自动化生成如何改变软件开发。早期实验显示在合成驱动的工作流和新工具范式方面的潜力。

items.title_en: We decreased our LLM costs with Opus
items.title_zh: 通过 Opus 降低 LLM 成本
items.summary_en: The team reports significant cost reductions for running LLM workloads using Opus, outlining the approach and its trade-offs in accuracy vs. efficiency. The post provides practical guidance for teams optimizing inference budgets without sacrificing too much performance.
items.summary_zh: 团队在使用 Opus 的情况下显著降低了运行大型语言模型的成本，概述了方法与准确性与效率之间的权衡。文章为在不大幅牺牲性能的前提下优化推理预算的团队提供实用建议。

items.title_en: I recreated the Apple Lisa computer inside an FPGA [video]
items.title_zh: 我在 FPGA 中重现 Apple Lisa 计算机
items.summary_en: A hands-on project recreates the Apple Lisa architecture on an FPGA, offering a tangible tour of its hardware quirks and OS interactions. It provides nostalgia plus a practical view into how legacy systems can be prototyped today.
items.summary_zh: 通过在 FPGA 上复现 Apple Lisa 的架构，展示了其硬件特点与与操作系统的交互。既有怀旧情怀，也展现了用现代现场可编程硬件原型化旧系统的可行性。

items.title_en: Show HN: AI CAD Harness
items.title_zh: Show HN：AI CAD Harness（AI CAD 助力工具）
items.summary_en: Show HN: AI CAD Harness introduces a toolkit to inject AI capabilities into CAD workflows, enabling smarter drafting and generative design.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：AI CAD Harness 提供一套将 AI 能力注入 CAD 工作流的工具集，支持更智能的草图与生成式设计。

items.title_en: Show HN: Adblock-rust Manager – Firefox extension to enable the Brave ad blocker
items.title_zh: Show HN：Adblock-rust Manager——在 Firefox 中启用 Brave 风格的广告拦截
items.summary_en: A Show HN project delivering a Firefox extension that runs Rust-based ad-blocking logic to emulate Brave-like blocking inside Firefox. It highlights performance and privacy benefits from using Rust and how it fits into user control over ads.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 项目提供一个 Firefox 扩展，利用 Rust 实现的广告拦截逻辑，在 Firefox 里实现类似 Brave 的拦截功能。强调 Rust 带来的性能与隐私优势，以及对用户控制广告的意义。

items.title_en: Coffee with a splash of physics: how to make the most out of your brew
items.title_zh: 带着一点物理学的咖啡：如何把冲泡发挥到极致
items.summary_en: Physics-informed coffee brewing tips explain how heat transfer, diffusion, and extraction time shape flavor, offering practical tweaks for grind size, water temperature, and brew duration. A practical read for coffee nerds seeking repeatable, tastier results.
items.summary_zh: 通过热传导、扩散和萃取时间等物理原理解释咖啡风味形成，并给出在研磨、水温和浸泡时间上的实用调整，帮助追求稳定且更美味的冲泡结果。

items.title_en: Germany Overtakes US in Ammunition Production Capacity
items.title_zh: 德国在弹药产能方面超越美国
items.summary_en: Germany reportedly overtook the US in ammunition production capacity, driven by defense spending and manufacturing efficiencies. The shift could impact NATO readiness and supply chain dynamics in conflict scenarios and procurement planning.
items.summary_zh: 德国在弹药生产能力方面超过美国，这得益于国防支出和制造效率的提升。这一变化可能影响北约的备战、供应链动态以及相关采购策略。

items.title_en: An unknown Sega Saturn project has come to light after 29 years
items.title_zh: 29 年后曝光的未知 Sega Saturn 项目
items.summary_en: New details surface about an unreleased Sega Saturn project after nearly three decades, shedding light on late-era development and enriching retro gaming lore.
items.summary_zh: 在近三十年后，曝光了一个未发布的世嘉 Saturn 项目，提供了晚期开发的新线索，丰富了复古游戏的传说。

items.title_en: A statement about why RightsCon 2026 will not take place in Zambia
items.title_zh: RightsCon 2026 不在赞比亚举行的声明
items.summary_en: RightsCon 2026 will not be hosted in Zambia, according to an official statement from the conference organizers. The note outlines the reasons behind the decision and hints at alternate plans, signaling where the event will land next. The move underscores how political and logistical factors shape global digital rights gatherings.
items.summary_zh: RightsCon 2026 不在赞比亚举行的官方声明揭示了决定背后的原因，并暗示将有替代安排，指向下一步的举办地点。此举反映了政治与后勤因素如何影响全球数字权利大会的安排。

items.title_en: A good AGENTS.md is a model upgrade. A bad one is worse than no docs at all
items.title_zh: 好的 AGENTS.md 是模型升级。糟糕的文档比没有文档还糟
items.summary_en: A well-crafted agents.md can improve AI agent reliability and maintainability, while sloppily documented agents can degrade understanding and safety. The post offers best practices for writing effective agents documentation.
items.summary_zh: 文章指出，优秀的 agents.md 能提升 AI 代理的鲁棒性和维护性；相反，差的文档会带来误导和风险，并给架构带来负面影响。给出编写指南与最佳实践。

items.title_en: Making AI chatbots friendly leads to mistakes and support of conspiracy theories
items.title_zh: 让 AI 聊天机器人更友好会导致错误并助长阴谋论
items.summary_en: A study shows that making AI chatbots friendlier can increase user trust but also lead to mistakes and a higher chance of conspiracy-belief propagation. It warns designers to balance friendliness with accuracy and guardrails.
items.summary_zh: 研究发现让 AI 聊天机器人更友好会提高用户信任，却也可能带来错误和助长阴谋论的传播。提醒设计师在友好度、准确性和安全机制之间取得平衡。

items.title_en: Brain scans reveal 3 ADHD subtypes
items.title_zh: 脑部成像揭示 ADHD 的三种亚型
items.summary_en: Brain scans reveal three ADHD subtypes, suggesting a more nuanced neurobiological categorization that could guide diagnosis and personalized treatment.
items.summary_zh: 脑部成像显示 ADHD 有三种亚型，提示更细致的神经生物学分型，或有助于诊断和个性化治疗方案。

items.title_en: Postgres's lateral joins allow for quite the good eDSL
items.title_zh: PostgreSQL 的横向连接让人可以构建相当优秀的 eDSL
items.summary_en: PostgreSQL's lateral joins unlock expressive, embedded DSLs by letting subqueries reference outer columns. The technique can simplify building domain-specific languages inside SQL and enable powerful, composable query patterns.
items.summary_zh: PostgreSQL 的横向连接使子查询能引用外部列，从而支持更具表达力的嵌入式 DSL。此技术有助于在 SQL 内部构建领域特定语言，并实现更强大、可组合的查询模式。

items.title_en: Apple CMF (Color-Matching Functions) 2026
items.title_zh: 苹果 CMF 2026：色彩匹配函数评测
