items.summary_en: Apple's CMF 2026 evaluation covers Studio Display XDR color accuracy across lighting conditions, with measurements of color fidelity, gamma, and gamut coverage. The results highlight how Apple calibrates displays for creative work and the importance of precise color science in consumer hardware.
items.summary_zh: Apple 的 CMF 2026 测评聚焦 Studio Display XDR 的色彩还原在不同照明条件下的表现，涵盖色彩保真度、伽马和色域覆盖等指标。报告强调苹果在创作工作对色彩准确性的需求上的校准，以及色彩科学在消费级硬件中的重要性。

items.title_en: Running Bare-Metal Rust Alongside ESP-IDF on the ESP32-S3's Second Core
items.title_zh: 在 ESP32-S3 的第二核心上并行运行裸机 Rust 与 ESP-IDF
items.summary_en: A practical case study demonstrates running Rust bare-metal alongside ESP-IDF on the ESP32-S3’s second core, highlighting how multi-language embedded stacks can co-exist and potentially boost performance.
items.summary_zh: 一个实用案例展示在 ESP32-S3 的第二核心上将裸机 Rust 与 ESP-IDF 并行运行，凸显多语言嵌入式栈的共存与潜在性能提升。

items.title_en: Consequences of passing too few register parameters to a C function
items.title_zh: 向 C 函数传递过少寄存器参数的后果
items.summary_en: Passing too few register parameters to a C function can corrupt the call stack and crash programs due to ABI mismatches. The piece walks through why keeping call conventions aligned matters and how to diagnose such issues.
items.summary_zh: 向 C 函数传递过少寄存器参数会因调用约定不匹配而破坏调用栈、导致程序崩溃。文中解释了为何保持调用约定一致性的重要性以及如何排查相关问题。

items.title_en: I benchmarked Claude Code's caveman plugin against "be brief."
items.title_zh: 我用 Caveman 插件对比 Claude Code 与 be brief
items.summary_en: I benchmarked Claude Code's caveman plugin against be brief, comparing how they compress or summarize code-related prompts. The results offer practical takeaways for using AI to paraphrase or shorten code-related content.
items.summary_zh: 我对 Claude Code 的 Caveman 插件与 be brief 进行了基准对比，评估它们对代码相关提示的压缩与摘要效果。结果给出在简化代码相关文本时的实际经验教训。

items.title_en: A playable DOOM MCP app
items.title_zh: 一个可玩的 DOOM MCP 应用
items.summary_en: A playable DOOM app built around MCP demonstrates interactive gameplay within a constrained runtime, illustrating how classic games can be ported or reimagined in new runtimes. It showcases creative integration of legacy engines with modern tooling.
items.summary_zh: 一个以 MCP 构建的可玩 DOOM 应用，展示在受限运行时环境中实现互动游戏的可能。它体现了将经典引擎与现代工具进行创意整合的能力。

items.title_en: I Spent My Sabbatical Building a Power Meter for Sledgehammers
items.title_zh: 休假期间，我用来量化铁锤击打力量的功率计
items.summary_en: During a sabbatical, the author built a power meter for sledgehammers, turning a blunt tool into a data-collection device. The project blends hardware tinkering with practical engineering insights about sensors and durability.
items.summary_zh: 作者在休假期间自行打造了一台用于测量铁锤击打功率的仪器，将工具本身转化为数据采集设备。该项目融合了硬件动手能力与对传感器与耐用性的实际工程见解。

items.title_en: At Protocol: Building the Social Internet
items.title_zh: At Protocol：打造社交互联网
items.summary_en: At Protocol outlines a plan for a decentralized social internet, emphasizing interoperability, user ownership of data, and open governance. It frames a shift away from centralized platforms toward portable social networks.
items.summary_zh: At Protocol 描绘了一个去中心化的社交互联网愿景，强调数据所有权、互操作性和开放治理，倡导让社交网络摆脱对单一平台的依赖。

items.title_en: Make your own microforest (2025)
items.title_zh: 在家自造微森林
items.summary_en: A guide to creating a microforest in a small urban space, outlining species selection, planting density, and care using approaches like Miyawaki. It shows how individuals can boost biodiversity and urban cooling with tiny forests.
items.summary_zh: 介绍在小型城市空间内自制微森林的要点，涵盖物种选择、密植与养护，采用宫崎式等方法。强调个人也能通过小小森林提升生物多样性和城市降温效果。

items.title_en: Modern C++ Programming: Busato
items.title_zh: 现代 C++ 编程：Busato
items.summary_en: A contemporary resource set for C++ programmers, covering modern language features, patterns, and best practices. It reflects ongoing emphasis on practical, maintainable C++ in real-world projects.
items.summary_zh: 一本面向现代 C++ 编程的资源集，聚焦最新语言特性、设计模式与实用实践，体现对实战中可维护性的重视。

items.title_en: My Stratum-0 Atomic Clock
items.title_zh: 我的 Stratum-0 原子钟
items.summary_en: Details a Stratum-0 precision clock project, explaining what constitutes Stratum-0 time, calibration challenges, and why ultra-precise timekeeping matters for distributed systems, communications, and security.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 Stratum-0 原子钟的实现与原理，解释何为最高精度的时间参考、标定难点，以及为何对分布式系统、通信和安全至关重要。

items.title_en: A Guide to CubeSat Mission and Bus Design
items.title_zh: 立方卫星任务与总线设计指南
items.summary_en: CubeSats democratize access to space by requiring compact, modular design. This guide covers mission planning and bus subsystems like power, attitude control, and communications, helping students and researchers craft affordable space experiments.
items.summary_zh: 立方卫星以小型化、模块化设计降低进入太空的门槛。该指南讲解任务规划与总线子系统（如电力、姿态控制与通信），为学生和研究者打造经济实用的太空实验提供参考。

items.title_en: Care homes and hotels in Japan shut as expansion strategy unravels
items.title_zh: 日本养老院与酒店在扩张策略瓦解后关闭
items.summary_en: Care homes and hotels in Japan face closures as aggressive expansion plans unravel, signaling strain across service and real estate sectors. Demographic headwinds, labor shortages, and capital constraints undercut growth bets. The development raises questions for operators and investors about sustainable models in an aging society.
items.summary_zh: 日本部分养老院与酒店在扩张计划瓦解后宣布关闭，反映服务业与地产领域的压力。人口老龄化带来的挑战、劳动力短缺和资金约束削弱了扩张预期。此情形引发对在老龄化社会中可持续商业模式的关注。

items.title_en: Joby kicks off NYC electric air taxi demos with historic JFK flight
items.title_zh: Joby 在纽约启动电动空中出租车示范，肯尼迪机场首飞具有历史意义
items.summary_en: Joby Aviation kicks off a NYC electric air taxi demo program with a historic JFK flight, showcasing urban air mobility in a real-world city setting. The demonstrations will test flight performance, safety, and regulatory pathways for future passenger service.
items.summary_zh: Joby Aviation 在纽约启动电动空中出租车示范，首场在肯尼迪机场的历史性飞行标志着城市空中出行的实际测试。示范将评估飞行性能、安全性及未来商用的监管路径。

items.title_en: L123: A Lotus 1-2-3–style terminal spreadsheet with modern Excel compatibility
items.title_zh: L123：具现代 Excel 兼容性的 Lotus 1-2-3 风格终端电子表格
items.summary_en: L123 recreates Lotus 1-2-3-style terminal spreadsheets with modern Excel compatibility, offering a lightweight, text-based workflow for quick data entry and retro computing nostalgia. It provides a bridge for users who want a fast terminal UI while still leveraging Excel import/export features.
items.summary_zh: L123 将 Lotus 1-2-3 风格的终端电子表格与现代 Excel 兼容性结合，提供轻量级、文本界面的快速数据处理体验，兼具复古计算的乐趣。它让偏好终端工作流的用户仍然能够使用 Excel 的导入导出功能。

items.title_en: Adding a team was the wrong strategic decision
items.title_zh: 增设团队是错误的战略决策
items.summary_en: An argument that adding a new team was a strategic misstep, possibly due to misalignment with product goals, culture, or distraction; offers lessons on scaling and focus.
items.summary_zh: 作者认为增设新团队是一次战略性错误，可能与产品目标、文化或注意力分散有关。文章提出在组织扩张与资源分配中的经验教训。

items.title_en: Show HN: Winpodx – run Windows apps on Linux as native windows
items.title_zh: Show HN：Winpodx——在 Linux 上以本地 Windows 窗口运行 Windows 应用
items.summary_en: Show HN: Winpodx enables Windows apps to run on Linux with native-looking Windows windows, illustrating progress in cross-OS app compatibility. The project demonstrates how far toolchains and UI integration have come for Linux users.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：Winpodx 让 Windows 应用在 Linux 上以原生 Windows 窗口显示运行，体现跨操作系统应用兼容性的进展。该项目展示了 Linux 用户在工具链和 UI 集成方面的最新进展。

items.title_en: Tar Files Created on macOS Display Errors When Extracting on Linux (2024)
items.title_zh: macOS 创建的 tar 文件在 Linux 解压时显示错误（2024）
items.summary_en: Describes compatibility issues where tar archives created on macOS fail to extract cleanly on Linux due to BSD vs GNU tar differences, with examples and practical fixes.
items.summary_zh: 指出在 macOS 上创建的 tar 档在 Linux 上解压时出现兼容性问题，原因涉及 BSD 与 GNU tar 的差异，并给出示例与实际修复方法。

items.title_en: Gallium oxide electronics withstand extreme cold
items.title_zh: 氧化镓电子在极端低温下仍能稳定工作
items.summary_en: Gallium oxide-based electronics withstand cryogenic temperatures, enabling reliable sensing and processing in extreme cold environments. The study suggests material advantages for aerospace, space equipment, or quantum experiments where conventional semiconductors fail.
items.summary_zh: 镓氧化物基电子器件在极低温环境下仍能稳定工作，显示出在极寒条件下的可靠性。该研究提示这类材料在航天、极端环境与量子实验等场景具备潜在优势，因为传统半导体在低温下性能受限。

items.title_en: Managing the Unmanaged Switch
items.title_zh: 管理未受控的交换机
items.summary_en: Managing the unmanaged switch discusses strategies to mitigate switch-based network risk, including segmentation, monitoring, and careful architecture to avoid broadcast storms.
items.summary_zh: 探讨在使用非管理型交换机的网络环境中，如何通过分段、监控与合理架构来降低风险，避免广播风暴等问题。

items.title_en: The IBM Granite 4.1 family of models
items.title_zh: IBM Granite 4.1 系列模型
items.summary_en: IBM unveils Granite 4.1, a family of foundation models tailored for enterprise AI workloads.
items.summary_zh: IBM 推出 Granite 4.1 系列基础模型，面向企业级 AI 工作负载。文章强调在安全性、治理与对业务场景的适应性方面的改进，显示 IBM 正在以企业就绪的选项参与基础模型市场竞争。

items.title_en: Because it doesn't have to
items.title_zh: 并非一定要这样
items.summary_en: Not all problems demand complex solutions; this piece argues for embracing simpler, correct approaches when appropriate.
items.summary_zh: 并非所有问题都需要复杂解法；在合适情形下，应采用简单而正确的解决方案。

items.title_en: Systemd-manager-TUI: A TUI application for managing systemd services
items.title_zh: Systemd-manager-TUI：用于管理 systemd 服务的文本用户界面
items.summary_en: Systemd-manager-TUI is a terminal UI for managing systemd services. It provides easy start/stop, enable/disable, status checks, and log viewing from a compact CLI interface. Designed as a lightweight alternative for headless or constrained environments.
items.summary_zh: Systemd-manager-TUI 是一个用于管理 systemd 服务的文本用户界面。它通过紧凑的 CLI 界面提供启停、启用/禁用、状态查看和日志查看等功能。面向无头或资源受限的环境，旨在成为一个轻量替代工具。

items.title_en: Voice-AI-for-Beginners – A curated learning path for developers
items.title_zh: 面向开发者的入门语音 AI 学习路径
items.summary_en: Voice-AI-for-Beginners curates a learning path for developers to start with voice AI, covering recognition, synthesis, and practical projects to build up practical skills.
items.summary_zh: 面向开发者的入门语音 AI 学习路径为初学者提供系统化学习路线，涵盖语音识别、文本转语音以及实际项目，帮助快速上手。

items.title_en: Artemis II fault tolerance
items.title_zh: 阿耳忒弥斯 II 的容错设计
items.summary_en: Artemis II fault-tolerance overview discusses redundancy, safety, and reliability requirements for NASA's crewed lunar mission, reflecting hard engineering constraints.
items.summary_zh: 《阿耳忒弥斯 II》容错概览讨论了载人月球任务的冗余、安全性与可靠性要求，反映出严苛的工程约束。

items.title_en: Apple reports second quarter results
items.title_zh: 苹果发布第二季度业绩
items.summary_en: Apple reported its second-quarter results, with continued strength in services and iPhone ecosystem, while investors watch for margins and future guidance amid macro headwinds.
items.summary_zh: 苹果公布第二季度业绩，服务与 iPhone 生态继续强劲，但投资者将关注毛利率与未来展望，以及在宏观挑战下的增长动能。

items.title_en: "Parse, don't validate" through the years with C++
items.title_zh: 多年来的解析与验证：C++ 的演变
items.summary_en: Charts the evolution of C++ practices from heavy validation toward robust parsing strategies, covering safer parsing techniques, security implications, and how this affects API design and data handling.
items.summary_zh: 回顾 C++ 领域多年来的实践演变，强调从重验证转向更稳健的解析策略，讨论安全性、解析方法的选择及对 API 设计的影响。

items.title_en: Follow-up to Carrot disclosure: Forgejo
items.title_zh: Carrot 披露后续：Forgejo
items.summary_en: A follow-up discussion ties the Carrot disclosure to Forgejo, examining the security implications and how open-source projects should respond to disclosure incidents.
items.summary_zh: 关于 Carrot 披露的跟进将焦点放在 Forgejo，探讨安全影响以及开源项目在披露事件中的应对之道。

items.title_en: Welcome to Hell Developer
items.title_zh: 开发者的地狱之路
items.summary_en: Explores a hidden debug mode in a cycling hardware device, revealing how debugging access can unlock advanced capabilities while risking stability. The piece prompts a reflection on balancing developer access and product safety.
items.summary_zh: 揭示了一款自行车设备中的隐藏调试模式，显示开发者访问可开启高级功能，同时也可能影响稳定性，引发对开发者权限与产品安全的权衡讨论。

items.title_en: AI, Intimacy, and the Data You Never Meant to Share
items.title_zh: AI、亲密关系与你本来不想分享的数据
items.summary_en: Examines how AI systems handle intimate data and the risks of unintentional sharing, including prompts, training inputs, and inferred details. It advocates privacy-by-design and user controls to mitigate exposure in conversational AI. The piece underscores growing tension between personalization and personal privacy.
items.summary_zh: 审视 AI 系统如何处理亲密数据及可能未曾打算分享的信息的风险，包括输入提示、训练数据与推断结果。主张从隐私设计出发，强化用户控制以降低对话式 AI 的数据暴露。强调个性化服务与个人隐私之间日益紧张的博弈。

items.title_en: Tendril – a self-extending agent that builds and registers its own tools
items.title_zh: Tendril —— 一个自我扩展的代理，能构建并注册自己的工具
items.summary_en: Tendril is a self-extending agent that can build and register its own tools, enabling autonomous expansion of capabilities without separate human setups. The project spotlights the potential—and the governance challenges—of agents that bootstrap their own toolchains.
items.summary_zh: Tendril 是一个能够自我扩展、构建并注册自身工具的代理，能在无需额外人工配置的情况下扩展能力。该项目凸显了自我引导工具链的潜力与治理挑战。

items.title_en: Notepad++ for Mac – Independent community port
items.title_zh: Mac 版 Notepad++：独立社区移植
items.summary_en: Details the community-driven port of Notepad++ to macOS, covering compatibility adjustments, performance considerations, and licensing questions. It illustrates how community projects extend classic tools beyond their native ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: 讲述 Notepad++ 面向 macOS 的社区移植项目，涵盖兼容性调整、性能考量和许可问题，展示社区项目如何将经典工具带入新的生态系统。

items.title_en: Voice Modems
items.title_zh: 语音调制解调器
items.summary_en: A retrospective on voice modems traces their role in early digital communications and why modern networks migrated away from them. It highlights the evolution of dial-up-era tech and its lasting legacy.
items.summary_zh: 回顾语音调制解调器在早期数字通信中的作用，以及为何现代网络逐步摆脱它们。揭示拨号上网时代技术的演变与持久影响。

items.title_en: Bitmap and tilemap generation from a single example
items.title_zh: 从单一样例生成位图与瓦片图
items.summary_en: Describes a method to generate textures and tilemaps from a single example image using a pattern-reconstruction approach, enabling rapid content creation for games and simulations.
items.summary_zh: 介绍了一种从单一示例图像生成位图与瓦片图的方法，使用模式重构的思路，便于游戏与仿真中的快速内容创作。

items.title_en: The More Young People Use AI, the More They Hate It
items.title_zh: 年轻人越用 AI 越讨厌它
items.summary_en: Gen Z's growing use of AI correlates with rising dissatisfaction, driven by privacy concerns, output quality, and perceived hype vs. reality.
items.summary_zh: Gen Z 越来越多地使用 AI，却越发对其感到厌烦，担忧隐私、输出质量和炒作与现实的差距。文章探讨这对产品设计、教育与监管的影响。

items.title_en: The Science Behind Honey's Eternal Shelf Life (2013)
items.title_zh: 蜂蜜永恒保质期背后的科学（2013）
items.summary_en: Explains why honey can last essentially indefinitely when stored properly: very low water activity, acidic pH, and natural antimicrobial compounds hinder microbial growth. It also notes practical caveats like crystallization and storage conditions.
items.summary_zh: 蜂蜜在妥善储存时几乎可无限保质的科学原因在于水活性极低、酸性环境和天然抗菌成分，文中也提及会结晶和存储条件对保质期的影响。

items.title_en: Low-Compilation-Cost Register Allocation in LLVM-Based Binary Translation
items.title_zh: 在 LLVM 基于的二进制翻译中实现低编译成本的寄存器分配
items.summary_en: Researchers present a register allocation strategy for LLVM-based binary translation that minimizes compilation cost while maintaining high runtime performance. The approach reduces the overhead of dynamic translation by improving spill code efficiency and register reuse, enabling faster on-the-fly translation in emulators and VMs.
items.summary_zh: 研究提出一种在基于 LLVM 的二进制翻译中低编译成本的寄存器分配策略，在保持高运行时性能的同时减少编译开销。该方法通过提高溢出代码效率和寄存器复用来降低动态翻译的开销，适用于仿真器和虚拟机中的即时翻译。

items.title_en: Our principles
items.title_zh: 我们的原则
items.summary_en: OpenAI lays out guiding principles emphasizing safety, usefulness, and alignment with long-term human interests; discusses governance and responsibility in AI deployment.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 公布了指引原则，强调安全、实用性及与人类长期利益的一致性，并讨论 AI 部署中的治理与责任。

items.title_en: Ask HN: Is the Job Market Actually Bad?
items.title_zh: Ask HN：求职市场真的很糟吗？
items.summary_en: A discussion on whether the job market is truly bad, with anecdotes and data about hiring trends, wages, remote work, and regional differences. The thread surfaces nuanced views beyond headlines.
items.summary_zh: 关于求职市场是否真的很糟的讨论，涵盖招聘趋势、薪资、远程工作和区域差异等数据与观点，呈现超出 headline 的细致看法。

items.title_en: Introduction to Atom
items.title_zh: Atom 入门
items.summary_en: Provides a primer on Atom, the open-source text editor, covering core features, package ecosystem, and typical workflows, while noting its evolving status in the editor landscape.
items.summary_zh: 介绍开源文本编辑器 Atom 的核心特性、插件生态与常见工作流，并讨论其在编辑器生态中的定位与演变。

items.title_en: Recovering files from beyond the grave using PhotoRec
items.title_zh: 使用 PhotoRec 从已删除数据中恢复文件
items.summary_en: PhotoRec, a robust data recovery tool, demonstrates recovery capabilities even after deletion or partition damage scenarios. The piece walks through practical tips, caveats, and success cases, illustrating how open-source recovery tools can rescue valuable data. It emphasizes the importance of backups and the limitations of recovery in certain failure modes.
items.summary_zh: 介绍了使用 PhotoRec 这类强大的数据恢复工具，在删除或分区损坏等场景下尝试找回数据。文章给出实际操作要点、注意事项和成功案例，强调备份的重要性并指出在某些故障模式下恢复的局限性。

items.title_en: I scraped 1.94M Airbnb photos for opium dens, pet cameos, and messy kitchens
items.title_zh: 我抓取了 194 万张 Airbnb 照片，用于展示异趣房源与日常细节
items.summary_en: The author scraped 1.94 million Airbnb photos to illustrate diverse listings, raising questions about data collection ethics, privacy, and the use of public images for ML or research. It serves as a case study in data ethics and the potential for misuse or bias in large image datasets.
items.summary_zh: 作者抓取了约 194 万张 Airbnb 照片，用以展示不同房源的风格与细节，引发关于数据抓取伦理、隐私以及公开图片数据在机器学习或研究中的使用范围的讨论。该案例提醒开发者在数据采集时关注合规与潜在滥用风险。

items.title_en: Radar Laboratory – Interactive Radar Phenomenology
items.title_zh: Radar Laboratory：交互式雷達現象學
items.summary_en: Radar Laboratory offers an interactive platform to explore radar phenomenology, enabling researchers and students to visualize how radar signals interact with targets. The tool supports experimentation with detection, clutter, and propagation effects.
items.summary_zh: Radar Laboratory 提供一個交互式平台，讓研究人員與學生探索雷達現象學，直觀地看到雷達信號與目標的互動，並可實驗探測、雜波與傳播效應。

items.title_en: BookStack Moves from GitHub to Codeberg
items.title_zh: BookStack 将托管从 GitHub 转移至 Codeberg
items.summary_en: BookStack moves hosting from GitHub to Codeberg, reflecting debates about platform governance, privacy, and open-source hosting choices.
items.summary_zh: BookStack 将托管从 GitHub 转移至 Codeberg，出于隐私、许可证或治理方面的考虑，揭示开源托管平台的权衡。

items.title_en: Cybersec is a thankless job: expanding workload and shrinking pay packet
items.title_zh: 网络安全是件吃力不讨好的工作：工作量扩大却薪酬下降
items.summary_en: Cybersecurity pros face rising workloads and stagnating or shrinking pay, highlighting talent shortages and burnout risk as the field scales.
items.summary_zh: 文章指出网络安全专业人员的工作量在增加，但薪酬却在缩水，暴露出人才短缺和易燃尽的风险。讨论应对方法和行业趋势。

items.title_en: SpaceX rocket set for unintentional moon landing – well, a piece of it anyway
items.title_zh: SpaceX 火箭将进行意外的月球着陆——只是其中的一部分碎片
items.summary_en: SpaceX debris is expected to land on the Moon as part of a mission's aftermath, turning a misstep into a rare lunar encounter. The incident highlights the ongoing issue of space debris and lunar exploration.
items.summary_zh: 报道称 SpaceX 的残骸有望在月球表面着陆，成为一次罕见的月球遭遇。此次事件凸显太空碎片问题以及月球探索的长期挑战。

items.title_en: Our agent found a bug with WireGuard in Google Kubernetes Engine
items.title_zh: 我们的代理在 Google Kubernetes Engine 中发现 WireGuard 的一个 bug
items.summary_en: Our agent discovered a bug in WireGuard integration within Google Kubernetes Engine, detailing symptoms and the debugging process. The finding illustrates how networking in managed Kubernetes can produce subtle VPN issues that require careful triage.
items.summary_zh: 在 Google Kubernetes Engine 中发现了 WireGuard 的一个 bug，描述症状与调试过程。该发现揭示了托管 Kubernetes 的网络层可能出现的微妙 VPN 问题，需要细致的排错。

items.title_en: Tiled Words 6 Month Update
items.title_zh: Tiled Words 六个月更新
items.summary_en: Tiled Words gets a six-month progress update, sharing milestones, architectural choices and future plans. It reflects on the challenges of building a creative web project over time.
items.summary_zh: Tiled Words 的六个月进展更新，分享里程碑、架构选择与未来计划，反映在创意网络项目中持续迭代的挑战与经验。

items.title_en: Show HN: Mljar Studio – local AI data analyst that saves analysis as notebooks
items.title_zh: Mljar Studio：本地 AI 数据分析师，分析结果可保存为笔记本
items.summary_en: Mljar Studio runs locally to analyze data with AI and exports findings as notebooks, supporting offline privacy and reproducible data science workflows.
items.summary_zh: Mljar Studio 在本地运行，利用 AI 分析数据并将分析结果导出为笔记本，支持离线隐私与可重复的数据科学工作流。

items.title_en: MoQ Boy
items.title_zh: MoQ Boy：MoQ 库的一个案例博客
items.summary_en: MoQ Boy showcases a case study around using the MoQ mocking library for .NET, illustrating common patterns, pitfalls, and testing ergonomics through a narrative design.
items.summary_zh: MoQ Boy 以 MoQ 模拟库在 .NET 中的应用为案例，通过叙事化设计展示常用模式、坑点与测试使用的便利性。

items.title_en: Breaking up with WordPress after two decades
items.title_zh: 二十年后与 WordPress 说再见
items.summary_en: After two decades with WordPress, the author breaks away, citing plugin bloat, maintenance burden, and a desire for a more modern stack. The piece outlines a migration strategy, covering content preservation, SEO implications, and choosing a new framework or static-site approach. It serves as a case study for long-running sites reconsidering their tech stack.
items.summary_zh: 在 WordPress 持续使用了二十年后，作者决定告别，原因包括插件臃肿、维护负担与希望采用更现代的技术栈。文章给出迁移策略，涵盖内容保留、SEO 影响以及选择新框架或静态站点方案。这为长期站点重新评估技术栈提供了一个案例研究。

items.title_en: A Letter from Dijkstra on APL (1982)
items.title_zh: 迪克斯特拉关于 APL 的来信
items.summary_en: Dijkstra offers a thoughtful take on APL, weighing its expressive power against readability and maintainability. The letter context sheds light on how APL influenced early language design and the ongoing debate between conciseness and clarity.
items.summary_zh: 迪克斯特拉对 APL 的表达力与可读性之间的权衡提出独到见解，兼具赞赏与批评。此信件为早期编程语言设计的历史提供了洞见，展示简洁性与清晰度之间的张力。

items.title_en: In Kannauj, perfumers have been making monsoon-infused mitti attar for centuries
items.title_zh: 在 Kannauj，香水师世代以季风气息制成 mitti attar 的传统
items.summary_en: Kannauj perfumers have long crafted mitti attar infused with monsoon scents, a storied fragrance tradition. The piece dives into craft, history, and why scent-making remains a tech-adjacent culture of expertise.
items.summary_zh: Kannauj 的香匠世代以季风气息制成 mitti attar 的传统历史悠久。文章探寻这种香水工艺、历史背景，以及嗅觉技艺如何成为一种与科技相邻的文化。

items.title_en: Modern jet engine turbines: each blade a single crystal (2015)
items.title_zh: 现代喷气发动机涡轮：每个叶片都是单晶（2015）
items.summary_en: A 2015 overview of single-crystal turbine blades, showing how this materials advancement improves high-temperature strength and efficiency in modern engines. Provides historical context for ongoing aerospace materials research.
items.summary_zh: 2015 年对单晶涡轮叶片的概述，指出这一材料进步提升了高温强度和发动机效率，为现代航空材料研究提供了历史背景。

items.title_en: After Spain's blackout, its shift to renewables and grid evolution power on
items.title_zh: 西班牙停电后：向可再生能源与电网演进继续推进
items.summary_en: Spain continues investing in renewables and grid modernization after a major blackout, focusing on resilience, storage, and cross-border integration.
items.summary_zh: 在一次大停电后，西班牙继续推进可再生能源和电网现代化的进程，投资于升级、存储与新能源并网。分析政策、可靠性及技术在清洁能源未来中的作用。

items.title_en: I built the Playwright for desktop apps. 80% token savings
items.title_zh: 为桌面应用构建的 Playwright：实现 80% 的令牌节省
items.summary_en: A desktop-automation project that brings Playwright-like capabilities to desktop apps, achieving roughly 80% token savings in prompts for automation tasks.
items.summary_zh: 一个桌面应用自动化项目，将 Playwright 风格的能力引入桌面应用，在自动化任务的提示中实现约 80% 的 token 节省。

items.title_en: Direct electrochemical black coffee quality appraisal using cyclic voltammetry
items.title_zh: 直接用循环伏安法评估黑咖啡品质
items.summary_en: Researchers demonstrate that cyclic voltammetry can quantify coffee quality by analyzing oxidation/reduction features linked to roasting level and antioxidant content. The method offers a rapid, non-destructive assay that could standardize quality control in coffee supply chains.
items.summary_zh: 研究人员展示循环伏安法可通过分析氧化还原信号来表征烘焙程度与抗氧化物含量，从而评估咖啡品质。这种快速、非破坏性的方法有望为咖啡供应链带来标准化的质量控制。

items.title_en: 1.4 GW: battery storage at former Grohnde nuclear power plant
items.title_zh: 前 Grohnde 核电站 1.4GW 巨型储能
items.summary_en: A massive 1.4 GW battery storage project is planned at the site of the former Grohnde nuclear plant, signaling the shift to grid-scale storage and energy resilience. It shows how decommissioned plants can host renewable storage assets.
items.summary_zh: 在前 Grohnde 核电站计划建设 1.4GW 级别的巨型储能项目，标志着对电网规模化储能与能源韧性的重视。退役核电设施正在转为承载可再生储能的潜在资产。

items.title_en: The fastest Linux timestamps
items.title_zh: Linux 时间戳之最速
items.summary_en: Explores high-precision timestamps in Linux, including options like monotonic clocks and their performance tradeoffs. The piece helps developers pick the right clock source for latency-sensitive applications.
items.summary_zh: 探讨 Linux 的高精度时间戳选项（如单调时钟）及其性能权衡，帮助开发者为对延迟敏感的应用选择合适的时钟源。

items.title_en: When your digital life vanishes
items.title_zh: 当你的数字生活消失
items.summary_en: A meditation on data loss and digital fragility in modern life, urging readers to consider portability, offline backups, and resilient identity management.
items.summary_zh: 反思现代生活中数据丢失的脆弱性，强调数据可携带性、离线备份和健壮的身份管理的重要性。文中给出在互联世界中保护个人信息的实际建议。

items.title_en: Spirit Airlines canceled all flights and is going out of business
items.title_zh: Spirit Airlines 暂停所有航班，可能走向破产
items.summary_en: Spirit Airlines abruptly canceled all flights amid severe operational and financial strain, raising questions about liquidity and the airline’s future trajectory.
items.summary_zh: Spirit Airlines 突然宣布暂停所有航班，因运营与财务压力巨大，引发关于流动性和公司未来走向的担忧。

items.title_en: Largest Digital Human Rights Conference Suddenly Canceled
items.title_zh: 全球最大的数字人权会议 RightsCon 突然被取消
items.summary_en: RightsCon, the major digital human rights conference, was abruptly postponed or canceled, roiling the policy and advocacy communities. It signals how external events ripple through tech policy activism.
items.summary_zh: RightsCon 作为全球主要数字人权会议突然被取消，冲击了政策与倡导社群。文章探讨可能的原因、对正在进行的数字权利行动的影响，以及对主办方、参与者和赞助方的后续影响，反映出外部事件对科技政策行动的影响。

items.title_en: Improving ICU handovers by learning from Scuderia Ferrari F1 team
items.title_zh: 向法拉利 F1 团队学习改善 ICU 交接
items.summary_en: ICU handovers could benefit from the discipline of Formula 1 pit teams, applying structured briefings, checklists, and rapid decision loops to reduce miscommunication. The article shows practical steps that translate high-stakes racing rigor into safer patient transitions.
items.summary_zh: 将 F1 车队的高强度沟通节奏带入 ICU 交接，使用结构化简报、清单和快速决策循环来降低沟通错误。文章给出把高风险竞速领域的严谨移植到患者转运中的可操作做法。

items.title_en: LFM2-24B-A2B: Scaling Up the LFM2 Architecture
items.title_zh: LFM2-24B-A2B：对 LFM2 架构的扩展与放大
items.summary_en: The post details scaling LFM2 to 24B parameters with architectural and optimization tweaks to run on practical hardware, illustrating how large open models can be pushed toward real-world use.
items.summary_zh: 文中介绍将 LFM2 扩展到 24B 参数的架构与优化要点，以及在实用硬件上实现的策略，展示了开放基础模型向实际应用的可行路径。

items.title_en: First Tesla Semi Rolls Off High-Volume Production Line
items.title_zh: 首辆 Tesla Semi 正式下线并进入大规模生产线
items.summary_en: Marks a milestone as the Tesla Semi begins high-volume production, signaling momentum for electric commercial trucking and implications for supply chains and charging networks.
items.summary_zh: 标志着特斯拉 Semi 进入大规模生产阶段，为电动商用卡车的普及带来势头，并对供应链与充电网络产生潜在影响。

items.title_en: Am I the only one who hates delivery robots?
items.title_zh: 我是不是唯一讨厌送餐机器人的人？
items.summary_en: Los Angeles Times details Glendale residents' frustration with delivery robots, noting safety, noise, and social friction as automation expands in public spaces.
items.summary_zh: 洛杉矶时报报道显示，格伦代尔的送餐机器人引发居民不满，涉及安全、噪音与公共空间中自动化带来的社会影响等问题。

items.title_en: GameStop Preparing Offer for eBay
items.title_zh: GameStop 正在筹划对 eBay 的收购
items.summary_en: Reports suggest GameStop is preparing an offer for eBay, signaling potential consolidation in online marketplaces and new strategic bets around ecommerce and collectibles.
items.summary_zh: 报道称 GameStop 正在筹划对 eBay 的收购，暗示在线市场领域可能出现整合，以及在电子商务和收藏品市场的新策略布局。

items.title_en: Microsoft open sources DOS 1.00 on 45th anniversary
items.title_zh: 微软在 DOS 1.00 45 周年之际开源源码
items.summary_en: On DOS 1.0's 45th anniversary, Microsoft released the open-source release of the original operating system code, offering historical insight into the original software and development practices. The release invites researchers and enthusiasts to study early OS design and Microsoft’s archival practices.
items.summary_zh: 在 DOS 1.0 45 周年之际，微软公开了原始操作系统代码的开源版本，为研究早期软件与开发实践提供宝贵资料。此举为研究者与爱好者提供了了解早期操作系统设计与微软存档实践的机会。

items.title_en: We still don't have a more precise value for "Big G"
items.title_zh: 关于“大G”值，我们仍未得到更精确的数值
items.summary_en: Physicists still lack a definitive, more precise measurement of the gravitational constant G, with different experiments yielding inconsistent values. The stubborn uncertainty poses a challenge for precision physics and may hint at unidentified systematic errors or new physics.
items.summary_zh: 关于万有引力常数 G 的精确测量仍缺乏统一的更高精度数值，不同实验给出的结果不一致。这一持续的不确定性冲击精密物理学的基准，也可能指向未识别的系统误差或潜在的新物理。

items.title_en: Show HN: Site Mogging
items.title_zh: Show HN：Site Mogging
items.summary_en: Show HN features Site Mogging, a project that analyzes and aggregates website performance metrics, possibly offering insights into optimization opportunities for developers building fast, reliable sites.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示 Site Mogging，这是一款分析并聚合网站性能指标的项目，帮助开发者发现提升网站速度与可靠性的机会。

items.title_en: XOXO Festival Archive
items.title_zh: XOXO 节档案
items.summary_en: XOXO Festival Archive curates talks and artifacts from the indie tech festival, offering a window into early culture, design experiments, and the community that helped shape modern developer culture.
items.summary_zh: XOXO 节档案整理了独立科技节的演讲与资料，提供了对早期文化、设计实验以及塑造现代开发者文化的社区的洞见。

items.title_en: Show HN: Ableton Live MCP
items.title_zh: Show HN: Ableton Live 的 MIDI 控制协议实现
items.summary_en: An open-source project implementing a MIDI Control Protocol for Ableton Live, enabling external hardware and scripts to control the DAW. It showcases new automation workflows and potential for customized live setups.
items.summary_zh: 一个开源项目实现 Ableton Live 的 MIDI 控制协议，使外部硬件和脚本能够对这款数字音频工作站进行控制，展现了新的自动化工作流和定制化的现场演出潜力。

items.title_en: How did Banksy erect a statue in Central London?
items.title_zh: 班克西在伦敦市中心竖立雕像之谜
items.summary_en: An investigation into how Banksy erected a statue in central London, exploring stealth installation practices and the provocative use of public space.
items.summary_zh: 对班克西在伦敦市中心竖立雕像的手法进行探究，揭示其低调安装与对公共空间的挑衅性运用。这件作品再次凸显了这位匿名艺术家的影响力和话题性。

items.title_en: Roboticist-Turned-Teacher Built a Life-Size Replica of Eniac
items.title_zh: 从机器人专家转为教师：打造了 ENIAC 的等身复制品
items.summary_en: A robotics-trained educator built a life-size replica of ENIAC, reviving the iconic pre-transistor computer for teaching and public engagement. The project shows how hands-on making and robotics skills can illuminate early computing history and inspire students. It also demonstrates value in interdisciplinary approaches to tech education.
items.summary_zh: 一位具备机器人学背景的教师打造了 ENIAC 的等身复制品，用于教学与公众互动。该项目展示了动手制作与机器人技能如何点亮早期计算机历史并激发学生兴趣，同时凸显跨学科方法在科技教育中的价值。

items.title_en: DRAM Crunch: Lessons for System Design
items.title_zh: DRAM 短缺：对系统设计的启示
items.summary_en: DRAM supply constraints are forcing designers to rethink memory hierarchy, capacity planning, and power budgets. The piece distills practical lessons for system architects as memory costs rise.
items.summary_zh: DRAM 供给紧张迫使系统设计者重新审视内存层次结构、容量规划和功耗预算。文中为系统架构师提炼了在内存成本上升背景下的实用经验。

items.title_en: The predictable failure of the QDay Prize
items.title_zh: QDay Prize 的可预见失败
items.summary_en: The author argues that the QDay Prize was doomed from the start—misaligned incentives and unclear criteria led to a predictable failure. The critique offers lessons for designing ambitious tech-prize programs.
items.summary_zh: 作者认为 QDay Prize 从一开始就注定失败——激励错位、标准不清导致可预测的失败。该批评为设计有野心的科技奖项计划提供了经验教训。

items.title_en: The Rotary Un-Smartphone (2023)
items.title_zh: 旋转式无智能手机（2023）
items.summary_en: The Rotary Un-Smartphone project revisits a rotary dial experience as a minimal, privacy-focused device, eschewing modern apps for a tactile, slower form of communication. It examines design choices that prioritize user agency and a lighter digital footprint.
items.summary_zh: 通过重新回到拨号轮体验，该项目打造了一款低隐私、极简的设备，放弃大量应用，强调更具触觉和节奏的沟通方式。设计选择聚焦于提升用户自主性与减轻数字足迹。

items.title_en: Scott Aaronson on quantum: "Will you heed my warnings NOW?"
items.title_zh: Scott Aaronson 关于量子：‘现在你们会听我的警告吗？’
items.summary_en: Scott Aaronson reiterates urgent warnings about the long-term risks and timelines of quantum computing, urging policymakers, researchers, and the public to take precautions now. He discusses plausible futures, potential hazards, and strategies to mitigate existential risk.
items.summary_zh: Scott Aaronson 再次强调量子计算的长期风险与时间表，敦促政策制定者、研究者和公众立即采取应对措施。他讨论了可能的未来情景、潜在危害及减轻生存风险的策略。

items.title_en: Brent Crude hits $119.56/barrel peak today
items.title_zh: 布伦特原油价格今日达到新高：每桶 119.56 美元
items.summary_en: Brent Crude surged to 119.56 per barrel, hitting a fresh high, reflecting supply concerns and geopolitical factors. The move has broad implications for energy markets, inflation trajectories, and tech supply chains sensitive to oil prices.
items.summary_zh: 布伦特原油价格今日攀升至每桶 119.56 美元，触及新高。此举反映了供给担忧与地缘政治因素，可能对能源市场、通胀路径以及对油价敏感的科技供应链产生广泛影响。

items.title_en: Canva apologizes after its AI tool replaces 'Palestine' in designs
items.title_zh: Canva 道歉：其 AI 工具在设计中替换了“Palestine”
items.summary_en: Canva apologizes after its AI tool replaces 'Palestine' in designs, highlighting the need for guardrails and content moderation in generative tools.
items.summary_zh: Canva 因其 AI 工具在设计中错误替换了“Palestine”而道歉，凸显了生成性工具在内容审核与治理方面的需求。

items.title_en: Infrasound waves stop kitchen fires, but can they replace sprinklers?
items.title_zh: 低频声波能否替代喷淋系统？
items.summary_en: A startup claims infrasound waves can suppress kitchen fires, potentially replacing sprinklers; experts express skepticism about effectiveness, safety, and scalability. The topic underscores the long-standing challenge of reliable fire suppression tech.
items.summary_zh: 一家初创公司声称低频声波可扑灭厨房火灾，理论上或可替代喷淋系统；专家对效果、安全性与普适性持怀疑态度。此话题凸显了长期以来对可靠火灾抑制技术的挑战。

items.title_en: Zulip 12.0 Released
items.title_zh: Zulip 12.0 发布
items.summary_en: Zulip 12.0 brings new features and performance improvements to its streaming chat platform, improving workflows for teams with intricate threading and integrations. The release signals ongoing maturity of Zulip as an open-source option for structured, threaded collaboration.
items.summary_zh: Zulip 12.0 发布，带来新功能和性能提升，改善复杂线程与集成场景下的团队协作。此版本体现了 Zulip 作为开源结构化协作工具的持续成熟。

items.title_en: When the Internet Was a Place
items.title_zh: 互联网曾是一个场所
items.summary_en: A reflection on how the early Internet felt as a shared space, contrasting today's large platforms with the old days of independent hosts, blogs, and IRC. The piece argues that the sense of a public, navigable 'place' shaped technical culture and governance.
items.summary_zh: 回顾早期互联网作为共同场所的体验，比较当今以大平台为主的格局与昔日的独立主机、博客和 IRC 的时代。文章探讨这种“公共场所”的感觉如何塑造了技术文化与治理。

items.title_en: Magic by return of post: How mail order delivered the occult
items.title_zh: 邮购时代的魔法：邮政渠道如何传播秘术
items.summary_en: An essay exploring how occult practices and esoteric magic were marketed and distributed through mail-order channels, reflecting on the cultural and historical context of information networks. The piece ties postal history to the spread of belief and mysticism.
items.summary_zh: 一篇探讨在邮购渠道中传播的秘术与神秘学的历史现象，揭示信息网络如何塑造信仰与传播。文章将邮政史与神秘主义联系起来，展现文化与传播的交汇。

items.title_en: Show HN: Filling PDF forms with AI using client-side tool calling
items.title_zh: 使用客户端工具调用的 AI 填充 PDF 表单
items.summary_en: A client-side AI approach fills PDFs by invoking tools directly in the browser, offering private, on-device automation for form completion without sending data to servers.
items.summary_zh: 通过客户端在浏览器中调用工具实现 AI 自动填充 PDF 表单，提供私有化、在本地完成的表单填写自动化。

items.title_en: SatoshiGuesser – Roll for Bitcoin
items.title_zh: SatoshiGuesser – 为比特币来一把的掷骰子游戏
items.summary_en: A GitHub project that gamifies Bitcoin odds by rolling dice to simulate outcomes related to Satoshi, the smallest unit of BTC. The project blends crypto enthusiasm with probability play and can serve as a playful educational tool for understanding randomness in crypto systems.
items.summary_zh: 一个 GitHub 项目，通过掷骰子来模拟与比特币最小单位聪相关的赔率，玩味十足。该项目将对加密货币的热情与概率游戏结合，是理解区块链系统中随机性的有趣教育工具。

items.title_en: Shrdlu
items.title_zh: SHRDLU：早期自然语言理解程序
items.summary_en: SHRDLU was an early AI system from the 1960s that interpreted natural language in a blocks world, laying groundwork for later dialogue and planning systems. It remains a foundational milestone in AI history.
items.summary_zh: SHRDLU 是20世纪60年代的早期自然语言理解系统，能在方块世界中理解指令并执行计划，为后来的对话系统和规划研究奠定基础。

items.title_en: Show HN: A new benchmark for testing LLMs for deterministic outputs
items.title_zh: Show HN：用于测试 LLM 确定性输出的新基准
items.summary_en: The benchmark from Interfaze AI targets deterministic outputs for LLMs, offering a standardized way to measure and compare how consistently models reply to identical prompts. It helps engineers reduce nondeterminism in production systems.
items.summary_zh: Interfaze AI 推出的新基准专注于评估大模型输出的确定性，为在同一输入下模型回复的一致性提供标准化度量，帮助工程师降低生产环境中的非确定性。

items.title_en: Decoupled DiLoCo: Resilient, Distributed AI Training at Scale
items.title_zh: 解耦的 DiLoCo：大规模弹性分布式 AI 训练
items.summary_en: DeepMind presents Decoupled DiLoCo, a resilient, distributed AI training approach that decouples components for better fault tolerance and scalability.
items.summary_zh: DeepMind 提出解耦的 DiLoCo 架构，提升分布式 AI 训练的弹性与可扩展性，通过解耦各组件提升容错能力。

items.title_en: Branimir Lambov from IBM on Cassandra
items.title_zh: IBM 的 Branimir Lambov 谈 Cassandra
items.summary_en: Branimir Lambov from IBM discusses Cassandra, covering architecture, scalability, and where Cassandra fits in modern data workloads.
items.summary_zh: IBM 的 Branimir Lambov 讨论 Cassandra 的架构、可扩展性以及它在现代数据工作负载中的定位。

items.title_en: The Oscars just banned AI from winning acting and writing awards
items.title_zh: 奥斯卡刚宣布禁止 AI 获得最佳表演与编剧奖项
items.summary_en: The Oscars block AI from winning acting and writing awards, reinforcing human-centered categories and prompting studios to rethink AI's role in production. It signals a turning point for how AI is treated in mainstream entertainment awards.
items.summary_zh: 奥斯卡宣布禁用 AI 参与最佳表演与最佳编剧等奖项，强调人类作品的优先地位，并促使业界重新评估 AI 在制作中的角色。

items.title_en: When Dawkins met Claude – Could this AI be conscious?
items.title_zh: 当 Dawkins 遇见 Claude：这 AI 会有意识吗？
items.summary_en: Considers whether Claude-like AI could be conscious, using Dawkins’ ideas about biology and evolution to frame the debate. It weighs traditional markers of consciousness against modern AI behavior and capabilities. The piece prompts readers to reflect on what genuine awareness in AI would entail and why it matters.
items.summary_zh: 通过将道金斯的生物与进化观念引入，探讨像 Claude 这样的 AI 是否可能具备意识。对比传统意识标志与当代 AI 行为及能力，思考若 AI 真正具备意识需要具备哪些条件以及这对现实意义。

items.title_en: Utilyze measures how efficiently your GPU is doing useful work
items.title_zh: Utilyze：衡量 GPU 有用工作效率
items.summary_en: Utilyze introduces a metric to quantify how much of a GPU's work is 'useful' for real tasks. It separates productive compute from wasted cycles, memory stalls, or idle time to guide kernel choice and hardware planning. The project provides tooling to measure efficiency during runtime across workloads.
items.summary_zh: Utilyze 引入一个度量，用以量化 GPU 实际有用工作的比例。它将有用的计算与无效循环、内存瓶颈和空闲时间区分开来，帮助优化内核与硬件选型。该项目还提供运行时在不同工作负载下衡量效率的工具。

items.title_en: Canonical Under Attack
items.title_zh: Canonical 遭遇攻击
items.summary_en: Canonical reports a security incident affecting some services, with ongoing investigation and remediation. The incident underscores the resilience challenges of major open-source-driven platforms and the importance of incident response planning.
items.summary_zh: Canonical 披露部分服务遭遇安全事件并在进行调查与修复，这一事件反映了以开源为核心的平台在抗脆弱性方面的挑战以及应急响应的重要性。

items.title_en: A grounded conceptual model for ownership types in Rust
items.title_zh: Rust 拥有类型的扎实概念模型
items.summary_en: A grounded conceptual model for Rust's ownership types clarifies how borrowing, lifetimes, and safety semantics fit together. It helps developers reason about memory management and concurrency safety beyond formal type-system details.
items.summary_zh: 对 Rust 的拥有类型提出了一个扎实的概念模型，阐明了借用、生命周期与安全语义如何协同工作，帮助开发者在超越形式类型系统的层面理解内存管理与并发安全。

items.title_en: Show HN: Tiao, A two-player turn-based board game
items.title_zh: Show HN：Tiao，一款双人回合制棋盘游戏
items.summary_en: Introducing Tiao, a new two-player turn-based board game with online play and potential AI opponents. The project highlights approachable game design and opportunities for algorithmic competition.
items.summary_zh: 推出新作 Tiao，一款双人回合制棋盘游戏，支持线上对战并可能有 AI 对手。该项目聚焦易上手的游戏设计与潜在的算法对战机会。

items.title_en: Lessons from building multiplayer browsers
items.title_zh: 从构建多人游戏浏览器学到的经验
items.summary_en: Shares practical lessons from building multiplayer browser experiences, covering latency compensation, state synchronization, and UX tradeoffs. The piece distills actionable patterns for real-time web apps.
items.summary_zh: 分享在构建多人浏览器体验中的实用经验，涉及延迟补偿、状态同步和用户体验取舍等要点，总结出可直接落地的实时网页应用设计模式。

items.title_en: Lost in translation: The linguistic challenges facing N. Korean defectors (2025)
items.title_zh: 失落在翻译中：北朝鲜难民的语言挑战（2025）
items.summary_en: North Korean defectors face ongoing language hurdles when resettling, including dialect differences, education gaps, and mistranslation in media and official documents. These barriers complicate integration and access to services.
items.summary_zh: 北朝鲜叛逃者在重新安置时面临持续的语言障碍，包括方言差异、教育资源不足，以及媒体和官方文件的翻译误差。这些阻碍了融入与获取服务的过程。

items.title_en: The Secret Life of NaN (2018)
items.title_zh: NaN 的秘密生活
items.summary_en: NaN is more than a placeholder; the piece explores how NaN behaves across languages and operations, revealing quirks like comparisons and propagation that can trip developers. Understanding its semantics helps prevent bugs in numerical computation and data pipelines.
items.summary_zh: NaN 不仅是一个占位符，它的行为在不同语言和运算中存在差异，暴露出诸如比较和传播等容易导致 bug 的特性。理解其语义有助于避免数值计算和数据处理中的错误。

items.title_en: A beginner's guide to Sourcehut (2025)
items.title_zh: Sourcehut 初学者指南（2025）
items.summary_en: A practical tour of Sourcehut's open, lean toolchain for hosting code, builds, and mailing lists, with emphasis on self-hosting and privacy-friendly workflows. The guide contrasts Sourcehut with centralized platforms and offers steps to get started.
items.summary_zh: 这份指南介绍 Sourcehut 的开源、简洁的代码托管、构建和邮件列表工具链，强调自托管与隐私友好型工作流，并给出上手步骤。

items.title_en: Spirit Airlines Is Winding Down All Operations
items.title_zh: Spirit Airlines 将停止所有运营
items.summary_en: Spirit Airlines is winding down all operations as part of a restructuring, signaling a drastic shift for a budget carrier and its customers.
items.summary_zh: Spirit Airlines 正在进行全面停运的重组，显示出这家低成本航空的根本性策略调整及对乘客、员工的影响。

items.title_en: Apple Has Given Up on the Vision Pro After M5 Refresh Flop
items.title_zh: 苹果在 M5 刷新后放弃 Vision Pro 吗
items.summary_en: With disappointing sales or reception following the M5 refresh, analysts speculate that Apple may adjust expectations for Vision Pro and rethink its AR strategy. It signals growing pressure on AR/VR hardware bets in a competitive market.
items.summary_zh: 在 M5 刷新后 Vision Pro 反应平平的传闻流传，市场对这款高端可穿戴设备的前景引发再评估。文章指出高端 AR/VR 产品在当前市场环境下的挑战及苹果可能的应对策略。

items.title_en: Things C++26 define_static_array can't do
items.title_zh: C++26 的 define_static_array 做不到的事
items.summary_en: The piece highlights the limitations of C++26's define_static_array, clarifying what it cannot represent or support and how that shapes real-world library design.
items.summary_zh: 文章指出 C++26 中 define_static_array 的局限性，解释了它不能表达或支持的场景，以及这对实际使用和库设计的影响。

items.title_en: Show HN: Large Scale Article Extract of Newspapers 1730s-1960s
items.title_zh: 1730s-1960s 大规模报纸文章提取
items.summary_en: A project delivering large-scale extraction of newspaper articles from historical archives, enabling researchers to search and analyze century-spanning journalism.
items.summary_zh: 一个面向历史档案的大规模报纸文章提取项目，使研究者能够检索并分析跨越数十年的新闻报道。

items.title_en: The Hearts of the Super Nintendo (2024)
items.title_zh: 超级任天堂的心脏
items.summary_en: A deep dive into the SNES's hardware core reveals how its central components powered games and shaped the console's distinctive capabilities. The piece connects engineering choices to a lasting cultural impact in retro gaming.
items.summary_zh: 对 SNES 硬件核心的深度解析，揭示其核心组件如何支撑游戏性能并塑造这款主机的独特能力。文章将工程选择与复古游戏的文化影响联系起来。

items.title_en: Orinoco: Young Generation Garbage Collection
items.title_zh: Orinoco：年轻代垃圾回收
items.summary_en: Orinoco introduces a parallel scavenger for the young generation in V8, enabling faster GC pauses and higher throughput for JavaScript workloads.
items.summary_zh: Orinoco 为 V8 引入年轻代并行清理器，使 JavaScript 工作负载在垃圾回收时的暂停更短、吞吐更高。

items.title_en: Becoming a father shrinks your cerebrum
items.title_zh: 成为父亲会让大脑缩小吗？
items.summary_en: A study reports that fatherhood is associated with reduced gray matter in regions tied to social cognition and parenting behavior, suggesting adaptive brain remodeling to support parenting. The findings point to long-lasting neural changes tied to life transitions.
items.summary_zh: 研究发现，成为父亲与大脑灰质在与社会认知和育儿行为相关的区域的缩小有关，暗示为适应育儿而发生的脑部重塑。这一结果指向与人生阶段相关的长期神经变化。

items.title_en: The feed doesn't know you, and YouTube refuses to let you browse
items.title_zh: 信息流不认识你，YouTube 不让你随意浏览
items.summary_en: The piece argues that recommendation feeds narrow discovery by shaping what you see, while platforms like YouTube limit unpersonalized browsing experiences. It calls for more transparent algorithms and greater user control over exploration.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为信息流通过塑造你所看到的内容来限制探索空间，而像 YouTube 这样的平台往往不提供非个性化的浏览体验。呼吁提高算法透明度，并给予用户更多的探索控制权。

items.title_en: Using a 1978 terminal in 2026 (DEC VT-100)
items.title_zh: 在2026年使用一台1978年的 DEC VT-100 终端机
items.summary_en: A 2026 experiment uses a DEC VT-100 terminal to explore retro computing today, highlighting the charm and limits of 1970s hardware. The setup sheds light on minimal interfaces and resilience trade-offs compared to modern user experiences.
items.summary_zh: 用一台 DEC VT-100 终端机在2026年进行实验，展示了1970年代硬件的魅力与局限。该体验凸显极简界面与现代用户体验之间的权衡。

items.title_en: Your Terminal Is Burning Battery Like It's Mining Bitcoin
items.title_zh: 你的终端像在挖矿一样烧电
items.summary_en: A deep dive into how modern terminal apps and shells can drain laptop batteries by constant GPU/CPU work, GPU acceleration, and animations, akin to mining.
items.summary_zh: 这篇博文分析了终端应用和 shell 如何通过持续的 CPU/GPU 负载、动画等导致电池快速耗尽。给出针对 iTerm2 等工具的优化建议，帮助减少耗电。

items.title_en: Understanding the short circuit in solid-state batteries
items.title_zh: 理解固态电池中的短路现象
items.summary_en: Short circuits in solid-state batteries arise from dendrites and interfacial breakdown, with ongoing research into suppressing dendrite growth and stabilizing interfaces.
items.summary_zh: 固态电池的短路常见于枝晶生长和界面失稳，研究重点包括抑制枝晶和稳定界面以提升安全性与寿命。

items.title_en: Show HN: Loopsy, a way for terminals and AI agents on different machines to talk
items.title_zh: Show HN：Loopsy——跨主机的终端与 AI 代理通信
items.summary_en: Loopsy enables terminals and AI agents on separate machines to talk, enabling distributed orchestration and collaboration across environments.
items.summary_zh: Loopsy 让不同机器上的终端和 AI 代理能够通信，推动分布式编排与跨环境协作，同时引发对安全性与时延的讨论。

items.title_en: How Semiconductors Were Made in America
items.title_zh: 美国产半导体如何制造
items.summary_en: An overview of how semiconductors are made in the United States, covering manufacturing stages, supply-chain constraints, and policy implications that shape where chips are produced. It highlights the push to bring more fabrication domestically to secure critical tech infrastructure and reduce reliance on overseas fabs, with implications for customers and startups relying on domestic supply.
items.summary_zh: 概览美国产半导体制造的各个环节、供应链约束以及影响产地选择的政策因素。文章强调推动本土化晶圆厂建设以增强关键技术基础设施的安全性，并减少对海外晶圆厂的依赖，对依赖国内供应的企业与初创公司影响深远。

items.title_en: Show HN: Browser-based light pollution simulator using real photometric data
items.title_zh: 浏览器端光污染模拟器，使用真实光度数据
items.summary_en: A browser-based tool visualizes light pollution using real photometric data, offering an accessible way for researchers and enthusiasts to study sky brightness and urban impact.
items.summary_zh: 一个基于浏览器的光污染模拟工具，利用真实光度数据，可帮助研究者和爱好者直观地研究天空亮度及其对城市的影响。

items.title_en: SFO Gate Explorer
items.title_zh: SFO Gate Explorer 导航服务
items.summary_en: An interactive gate explorer for San Francisco International Airport helps travelers locate gates and navigate the terminal more efficiently during layovers or peak periods.
items.summary_zh: 一个面向旧金山国际机场的交互式登机门导航工具，帮助旅客在中转或高峰时段更高效地定位登机门与导航航站楼。

items.title_en: Show HN: Destiny – Claude Code's fortune Teller skill
items.title_zh: Show HN：Destiny——Claude Code 的算命技能
items.summary_en: Show HN introduces Destiny, a small project that builds a fortune-telling skill using Claude Code, demonstrating how LLMs can be composed into playful, interactive utilities. It highlights the potential for accessible, creative AI tools that feel personalized.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示 Destiny，这是一个用 Claude Code 构建的算命技能，展示了将语言模型组合成有趣、互动的小工具的可能性，体现了可及、富有创意的 AI 应用潜力。

items.title_en: On the stand, Elon Musk can't escape his own tweets
items.title_zh: 在法庭上，Elon Musk 无法摆脱自己的推文
items.summary_en: Elon Musk faced testimony about past tweets and communications, highlighting how social media activity intersects with legal obligations. The coverage underscores the broader tech- and finance-law implications of high-profile public statements.
items.summary_zh: 在法庭听证中，埃隆·马斯克就其以往的推文与发言接受质询，凸显社交媒体活动与法律义务之间的关系。报道强调公众人物言论对科技与金融领域的潜在法律影响。

items.title_en: Revocation of X.509 Certificates
items.title_zh: X.509证书的吊销机制
items.summary_en: Certificate revocation remains a tricky pillar of PKI, with CRLs and OCSP often lagging or exposing privacy concerns. The piece argues for adopting short-lived certificates and improved validation to reduce reliance on revocation checks.
items.summary_zh: 证书吊销是公钥基础设施中的一个棘手难题，CRL 与 OCSP 常常滞后且可能带来隐私风险。文章主张采用短期有效证书并改进在线验证以降低对吊销的依赖。

items.title_en: NHS Goes to War Against Open Source
items.title_zh: NHS 与开源的一场战争
items.summary_en: Critiques NHS policies that hinder open-source software adoption, arguing it stifles innovation, vendor neutrality, and security benefits from community-driven tooling. Calls for policy reforms to embrace open-source benefits in healthcare IT.
items.summary_zh: 批评 NHS 的做法，认为其对开源软件的限制阻碍创新、供应商中立性以及社区驱动工具的安全收益，呼吁在医疗 IT 中重新评估政策以拥抱开源的潜在好处。

items.title_en: Show HN: The Unix Magic poster, annotated (updated)
items.title_zh: Show HN：Unix 魔法海报，带注解（更新）
items.summary_en: Presents an annotated Unix Magic poster with updated notes, clarifying classic command-line techniques and their practical applications. The project serves as a teaching tool and nostalgia piece for seasoned developers.
items.summary_zh: 展示带注解的 Unix Magic 海报并更新了笔记，澄清经典命令行技巧及其实际应用，既是教学工具也是对老练开发者的致敬。

items.title_en: Electrostatics and High Voltage Links
items.title_zh: 静电学与高压入门资源
items.summary_en: Electrostatics and High Voltage Links provides foundational explanations and links for learning about electric fields, capacitance, and high-voltage safety.
items.summary_zh: 《静电学与高压入门资源》整理了电场、容抗与高压安全等基础知识与学习资源。

items.title_en: Cordouan Lighthouse
items.title_zh: 科杜昂灯塔
items.summary_en: Cordouan Lighthouse stands at the mouth of the Gironde estuary as one of France’s oldest and architecturally distinctive lighthouses. Its construction and upkeep illustrate the evolution of maritime signaling and state power.
items.summary_zh: 科杜昂灯塔位于吉伦特河口，是法国最古老且建筑风格独特的灯塔之一。其建造与维护反映了航海信号技术与国家权力的演变。

items.title_en: Show HN: My Private GitHub on Postgres
items.title_zh: Show HN：把私人 GitHub 放在 PostgreSQL 上
items.summary_en: A project stores private GitHub data in PostgreSQL, enabling a self-hosted, private code repository workflow. It raises questions about data portability, privacy, and how to run private repos at scale.
items.summary_zh: 一个项目将私有 GitHub 数据存放在 PostgreSQL 中，实现自托管、私有代码库工作流。此举引发对数据可移植性、隐私保护以及大规模私有仓库运行的讨论。

items.title_en: Hackers are actively exploiting a bug in cPanel and WHM
items.title_zh: 黑客积极利用 cPanel/WHM 漏洞
items.summary_en: Hackers are actively exploiting a vulnerability in cPanel/WHM, prompting urgent patching and security hardening for millions of websites.
items.summary_zh: 黑客正积极利用 cPanel/WHM 漏洞，促使大量网站紧急打补丁并加强安全防护。

items.title_en: Japan Is Building Cardboard Suicide Drones
items.title_zh: 日本在打造纸板自杀式无人机
items.summary_en: Reports on Japan's development of cardboard-based suicide drones, a low-cost, disposable weapon concept raising ethical and security concerns.
items.summary_zh: 报道显示日本正在开发纸板材料制成的自杀式无人机，这种低成本、一次性武器概念引发伦理、安保与军事部署方面的讨论。

items.title_en: I analyzed 571M Amazon reviews to find the most profanity-filled customer rants
items.title_zh: 我分析了 5.71 亿条亚马逊评论，发现最粗鲁的顾客吐槽
items.summary_en: The author analyzed 571M Amazon reviews to identify the most profanity-laden rants, revealing patterns across categories and customer sentiment.
items.summary_zh: 作者分析了 5.71 亿条亚马逊评论，揭示了各类商品中最粗口的顾客吐槽及情感模式。

items.title_en: Talking to Transformers
items.title_zh: 与 Transformer 对话
items.summary_en: Explores interacting with transformer models, covering prompt design, model behavior, and practical use cases. It highlights tips for getting more reliable outputs and understanding model limits.
items.summary_zh: 探讨与 Transformer 模型对话的要点，涵盖提示设计、模型行为与实际用例，给出提升输出可靠性和理解模型局限性的要点。

items.title_en: K3sup – bootstrap K3s over SSH in < 60s
items.title_zh: K3sup：通过 SSH 在 60 秒内引导 K3s
items.summary_en: Describes K3sup, a tool to bootstrap a K3s Kubernetes cluster over SSH in under a minute, emphasizing fast, low-friction cluster setup for demos, edge deployments, and quick experiments.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 K3sup 工具，能够在 SSH 下在不到一分钟内引导 K3s 集群，强调用于演示、边缘部署与快速试验的低摩擦部署体验。

items.title_en: Show HN: Pu.sh – a full coding-agent harness in 400 lines of shell
items.title_zh: Show HN: Pu.sh —— 用 400 行 shell 实现的完整编码代理工具
items.summary_en: Pu.sh showcases a compact, shell-based coding agent harness, demonstrating how orchestration tasks can be done with minimal code. It highlights the power and limits of shell for automation in AI-assisted workflows.
items.summary_zh: Pu.sh 展示在 400 行 shell 代码中实现的完整编码代理框架，演示利用极简代码进行任务编排的能力。该项目凸显了在 AI 辅助工作流中，Shell 脚本的优点与局限。

items.title_en: Show HN: I built a RISC-V emulator that runs DOOM
items.title_zh: Show HN：我构建了一个能运行 DOOM 的 RISC-V 模拟器
items.summary_en: A Show HN project releasing a RISC-V emulator capable of running the classic game DOOM demonstrates the practicality of emulator-based experimentation on modern architectures. It highlights accessibility for hobbyists to explore low-level systems.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 项目展示了一个能在 RISC-V 上运行 DOOM 的模拟器，展示了在现代体系结构上进行仿真和实验的可行性。对爱好者探索底层系统十分友好。

items.title_en: Dabbling in Erlang, part 2: A minimal introduction (2013)
items.title_zh: 涉猎 Erlang，第2部分：简明入门（2013）
items.summary_en: Offers a concise, approachable Erlang primer focused on lightweight processes, message passing, and fault tolerance. It provides small, hands-on examples to illustrate core concurrency patterns. A practical entry point for developers curious about the actor model and resilient systems.
items.summary_zh: 提供一个简洁易懂的 Erlang 入门，聚焦轻量级进程、消息传递与容错能力。通过小型实例演示核心并发模式，帮助开发者快速上手感知演员模型与鲁棒系统。

items.title_en: Discovering Hard Disk Physical Geometry Through Microbenchmarking (2019)
items.title_zh: 通过微基准测试发现硬盘物理几何（2019）
items.summary_en: A 2019 exploration of hard disk physical geometry through microbenchmarking, revealing variations in track layouts and encoding. The findings inform performance benchmarking, drive design, and OS I/O tuning.
items.summary_zh: 通过微基准测试深度研究硬盘物理几何结构，揭示磁道布局与编码的变动性；研究结果为性能基准、驱动设计和操作系统 I/O 调优提供参考。

items.title_en: Unverified Evaluations in Dusk's PLONK
items.title_zh: Dusk 的 PLONK 中的未验证评估
items.summary_en: It stresses the importance of thorough verification steps to ensure soundness and security. The takeaway is a reminder to audit end-to-end zkp pipelines and their verification logic.
items.summary_zh: 文章讨论 Dusk 的 PLONK 实现中的未验证评估，揭示了零知识证明协议潜在的风险。强调对验证步骤的严格要求，以确保稳定性与安全性。提醒审计端到端的零知识证明流程及其验证逻辑。

items.title_en: Show HN: TRiP – a complete transformer engine in C built from scratch just by me
items.title_zh: Show HN: TRiP — 我用 C 从零实现的完整 Transformer 引擎
items.summary_en: TRiP is a complete transformer engine implemented in C from scratch by a single developer. The project demonstrates high-performance, low-level optimization for neural network inference and offers insights into architecture decisions, memory layout, and SIMD usage. It's a rare solo attempt at building an end-to-end inference stack, valuable for systems programmers and ML researchers alike.
items.summary_zh: TRiP 是一个由单人用 C 语言从零实现的完整 Transformer 引擎。项目展示了面向神经网络推理的高性能、低层优化，揭示了架构设计、内存布局和 SIMD 的使用等要点，对于系统程序员和机器学习研究者都具有参考价值。

items.title_en: Underwater robot tracks sperm whale conversations in real time
items.title_zh: 水下机器人实时记录抹香鲸对话
items.summary_en: An underwater robot tracks sperm whale conversations in real time, enabling researchers to analyze vocalization patterns and social interactions. The project advances marine bioacoustics and demonstrates sensor fusion in challenging environments.
items.summary_zh: 水下机器人实时记录抹香鲸的交流，帮助研究者分析声纳模式和社交互动。该项目推动海洋生物声学研究，并展示在极端环境下的传感器融合能力。

items.title_en: Show HN: Stop playing my matchstick puzzles, start building your own in seconds
items.title_zh: Show HN：别再玩我的火柴棍拼图，几秒就能自建你的拼图
items.summary_en: Show HN: a tool that lets you generate your own matchstick puzzles in seconds, moving from playing to building.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：一个能让你在几秒内生成自定义火柴棍拼图的工具，帮助用户从解谜转向快速自建。

items.title_en: Compositing and Blending – Exploring the math and intuition behind blend modes
items.title_zh: 合成与混合——探索混合模式的数学与直觉
items.summary_en: An exploration of blend modes in graphics, covering the math of alpha compositing and how different modes affect color and contrast. The piece provides intuition for designers and practical tips for choosing blend modes in compositing and visual effects.
items.summary_zh: 本文深入讲解图像合成中的混合模式，涵盖透明度运算与不同模式对颜色与对比度的影响，并为设计师提供直观理解与实际选用建议。

items.title_en: You have to have an account to read IMDB reviews now
items.title_zh: 现在必须登录才能查看 IMDB 影评
items.summary_en: IMDB now requires user accounts to read reviews, reflecting the broader trend of gating access to user-generated content. The change affects casual readers and content ecosystems, potentially reducing discovery and increasing friction for new users.
items.summary_zh: IMDB 现在阅读影评需要登录账户，这体现了对用户生成内容进行门槛化的趋势。此举可能削弱随意浏览的便利性，增加新用户的使用门槛，同时影响平台的内容发现生态。

items.title_en: EFF Challenges Secrecy in Eastern District of Texas Patent Case
items.title_zh: EFF 在德州东区专利案挑战保密性
items.summary_en: EFF challenges secrecy in an Eastern District of Texas patent case, arguing transparency is essential for accountability in patent litigation.
items.summary_zh: EFF 对德州东区一项专利案中的保密安排提出挑战，主张在专利诉讼中应实现透明与问责。

items.title_en: Mystery Cpuid Bit
items.title_zh: 神秘的 CPUID 位
items.summary_en: CPUID flags reveal processor features, but some bits remain undocumented or poorly understood. This note digs into a mystery CPUID bit and why software sometimes encounters ambiguity in low-level detection.
items.summary_zh: CPUID 标志揭示处理器特性，但仍有一些位未被文档清楚描述。本文探讨一个神秘的 CPUID 位及其为何在底层检测中引发困惑。

items.title_en: Historic Tennessee hotel is also home to the greatest duck tradition (2016)
items.title_zh: 田纳西历史酒店与其鸭子传统
items.summary_en: The historic Tennessee hotel is famous for its long-running duckling tradition, a quirky hallmark that attracts visitors and preservationists. The feature highlights how small rituals can shape a property's identity and branding.
items.summary_zh: 这家历史悠久的田纳西酒店因其长期流传的鸭子传统而知名，成为吸引游客与保护者的独特标志。文章强调这种小型仪式如何塑造酒店的身份与品牌。

items.title_en: Tvheadend: Self-Hosted IPTV Server
items.title_zh: Tvheadend：自托管的 IPTV 服务器
items.summary_en: Tvheadend is a self-hosted IPTV server project that aggregates live TV, EPG, and DVR capabilities for home media setups.
items.summary_zh: Tvheadend 是一个自托管的 IPTV 服务器，集成直播电视、节目表与 DVR 功能，适合家庭媒体中心使用。

items.title_en: $500M for Virtual Biology Initiative, Funded by Zuckerbergs
items.title_zh: 由扎克伯格家族资助的虚拟生物学计划获 5 亿美元资助
items.summary_en: A $500 million commitment to a Virtual Biology Initiative backed by the Zuckerbergs aims to accelerate computational biology, simulations, and virtual experiments.
items.summary_zh: 由扎克伯格家族支持的虚拟生物学计划获5亿美元资助，目标是推动计算生物学、仿真和虚拟实验的发展。

items.title_en: Show HN: Startup Equity Adventure Game
items.title_zh: Show HN：创业股权探险游戏
items.summary_en: Showcases a browser-based game simulating startup equity and cap table dynamics, offering a playful lens on fundraising math and founder decisions. It presents an approachable way to explore equity scenarios.
items.summary_zh: 展示一个基于浏览器的游戏，模拟创业公司股权与股权表的动态，提供对募资算术与创始人决策的趣味化视角，便于理解各种股权情景。
